name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Virginia
body:
After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we keep building on this powerful momentum. | | |
---
| | We just learned we are going to have an ultra-competitive special election because of Tuesday's results: Virginia Democrats will have a chance to replace an anti-abortion Republican with a strong Democratic leader who will fight to secure a better future for their state in Virginia’s state legislature – **_and this election will be ultra-competitive._** **After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we continue this powerful momentum – and that could start with flipping this seat from red to blue.** The Virginia Senate is in play next year and special elections like this are vital opportunities to set state Democrats on a path to success. **Special elections can come down to just one or two votes – that’s why we’re pulling out _all_ the stops to ensure state Democrats are well-equipped to win this seat. This is EXACTLY the type of race that Democrats need to lay the foundation for Democratic power-building in 2023.** [Rush $7, $25 or whatever you can afford today to help state Democrats win critical special elections in states like Virginia and across the country >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-ODFUYDv1uMotfXxD5nehsgyWTQSyN-PPgwQLHL8JUOPBw7YbB_e9ZIEwjQsr9bIZ0Oy_1NzLb1fkJHR7obVQpKf5lNIEHpZgBXrSVirtfP9Hzo3rY2jwp08A9tbRmUGhm1BhcB9w52FQNRKkOfNzFcVt9YvwJtnM8X8fBfaK2jTTbClMz7U-uA4tUz_If5iRTbfCeC_IS60w_YtTKpP_rknN_GZfx91UU7toerusL_wdNrLjnLocR0YgLvrJ1ZqaMOqK6FOzoFrOoYbZEcXSFBq8hwPe80Fpn2K4lUhRHe550IjShXGoFw7GZDtgi4bLGU0BysqTGT7RisvzZtv7_ro/3r5/2zE-XuBKSeW2TMVBFQ8BLg/h0/Ai4cVxSb6VVPVI8e5Hyaxa_nQd4wZx6uqOLvmAvgZP8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Not all Democrats are the same, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Not all Democrats are the same,
Peter.

We not only deserve a Democratic Party that fights for the people — not
corporate donors — but need one to ensure the future of our democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120779?refcode=em20221113-26062&t=1001&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy ]If you already agree with our mission and are ready to elect
progressive, bold, candidates to help transform the Democratic Party, chip
in $3 or what you can today to help us with our recruitment
efforts.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120779?refcode=em20221113-26062&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy ]Contribute

Climate change, healthcare, immigration, housing, mass incarceration — the
issues of our time are urgent and demand urgent action. We don’t have the
time to wait on career Democrats who are beholden to corporate checks
rather than their constituents.

We believe that we can transform the Democratic party by building people
power from the ground up. That means empowering leaders already rooted in
their communities to primary their out-of-touch Democratic incumbents. So
cycle after cycle, that’s what we do — organize, mobilize, and win.

We recruited AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush to run for Congress — and
they won. We endorsed and supported Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, Pramila
Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Raul Grijalva, and Ro Khanna — and helped them win
re-election. And now our two newest Justice Democrats Greg Casar and
Summer Lee are joining their ranks in Congress. That’s a lot of wins!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120779?refcode=em20221113-26062&t=1021&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy ]While we’re making sure Greg & Summer have the resources they need to
prepare for Congress, we also have to look to the future.
Peter, can you
chip in to power our work for the upcoming cycle?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221113-26062-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26062_1203867_IzqYdy&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26062%2E1203867%2EIzqYdy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: We wouldn’t be here without the support of this grassroots team...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
No matter what happens in the coming days and weeks, know this: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. | |
---
Derek, last Tuesday was a good day for democracy -- and _a good day for America._ While we don’t know all of the results yet, here’s what we do know: We lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. **This victory is yours -- so let me start out by saying:_Thank you._ We wouldn’t be here without the support of this grassroots team.** When I came to office, we inherited a nation with a pandemic raging and an economy reeling. We acted quickly and boldly. With you by our side, we’ve vaccinated millions of people, created stable and sustained growth in our economy, and made long-term investments to rebuild America itself. Our economic policies created a record 10 million new jobs since I came into office. Unemployment rate is down from 6.4 percent when I was sworn in to 3.7 percent. **And we’re just getting started, Derek.** No matter what happens in the coming days and weeks, know this: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. After a long campaign season, I still believe what I always have. This is a great nation and we are a great people. There is nothing we can’t do if we do it together. **It goes without saying, our party is relying on you to continue building on our progress, and donations of $7 help keep our party running each and every day.** [**If you're with me, please consider making a $7 donation to the DNC today to continue the critical work to build a better America.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x_Axe9OmaJo0FwLB4twDFs1khOy1ef30zSiKcf1G0E3l-lYFcZ9llNnox4cg7e7ceznhacE_oMr2bonqmldzUfAUxdG1C49mQOV-2-_5ESnJCLApc7BARlDSATIqttCeKbXgIwfm4wZeuchKcjO3I38Ivxvz6oouGFAgzNWe4Wx5_LXrpiIbdbBML3bal5o96hoNFkS2x7tG7rR_qewyI_2dHrOMqii7aafv29WagUQTlPumr8O_hg0yrbdFVkSwRVY50Q-zs_wREJ1zCPfLYHh2qaSvcmzBwHNXgWdEjd3onUvMJMeVorvhYHS1TSvyEa07aeVKWPXfym_48wci2TztCHLNQEoGh7Vnf_a9_7K8oXfab3eQYawRBoXd3Gyt5Chdf1cCGaKSxDti4tf3e0wTjM57CN9Da7GL5Erxgm-1y3Ouap9l5a2IjWoeEhjh4EKp5_Rg2_hHWQpwTAo_ThpXpOHTdEftvTuGBGr9ey1aZ7_JZtzqnBkAajIkvRY6Vov9bupbLSTadOp9GaLp2gasvXC4rEiA3FGwhe3pY7li3VaF_kCE_o3mxEAQL6qroKvyA1Xs05RJ_yaewmPvzJEdULW3RWuZ4wCwtSR0010DmCOoH9AOjW32QhwDjnSmCZc-5Fu-ylL3zgmIj64d_0B4KrXHKCDnzzIzZ1JaIswF1yDqYE3rk9tUG4pGD8KAM/3r5/KZI8TgAgQd2Xye1fwsxrpw/h0/H-q8ftlO220SduaiD8yobls8zXXrRoay5kfQkkDyqq0) Thank you for all that you do, and all that you’ll continue doing. clean_body: We've got to save Georgia to save America! | Peter, I know JD Vance just won his election, but the fight 's not over yet in Georgia. Right now, in Georgia, Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life to win his run-off and stop radical Socialist Raphael Warnock from winning and ripping the rights and freedoms away from the people of Georgia. We know Election Day just came and went and, you've done everything AND MORE to help keep Ohio red, but we're asking for your help one more time to secure the Georgia Senate seat. | We don't have any more time to waste. We're begging that you step up so we can protect Georgia by getting Herschel Walker over the finish line! Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Once more, Georgia is headed to a runoff election for the Senate race. Since no candidate won an outright majority, the election is going to a runoff on December 6th. We need to rush our support for Republican Herschel Walker ASAP to ensure that we win this race! With only 4 weeks to go, we are activating a special 22X impact match for one day only. Thanks in advance, Georgia Runoff Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: R. Warnock
subject: My impact doesn't stop at the church door – that's where it starts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: With less than 30 days until the runoff election, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to keep Georgia blue. **But first, I'd like to explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win.**
I grew up in public housing in Savannah, Georgia, and I had 11 brothers and sisters. We were short on money but long on love and faith. From there, I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college, I earned a Ph.D., and 15 years ago, I was called to Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church.
As a pastor, I always thought my impact doesn't stop at the church door – that's where it starts. I've been a lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights. Now, I'm running for reelection to continue bringing these critical fights to Washington.
Listen, friend: The opportunities that made my journey possible, from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit, are growing further and further out of reach for far too many across this country. We have a chance to change that, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That's why I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to join me in this fight to keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54564637/378944291/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4871-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWE2YTk5NS1iYzYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-K-rsTF9-N98luB6bHZ6jKoXuhC658w2tfJVf3ya_M=)
Mitch McConnell and the GOP have already spent $52 million to flood Georgia with dishonest attack ads – on TOP of the more than $37 million my opponent has raised from GOP donors.
**With all signs pointing to an incredibly close runoff****, I've got nowhere else to turn – and I need you with me to win, friend:****[Give $5 or more right now to power our grassroots movement forward, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54564638/378944292/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4871-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWE2YTk5NS1iYzYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-K-rsTF9-N98luB6bHZ6jKoXuhC658w2tfJVf3ya_M=)**
Thank you for your support – I'm so grateful.

– Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=oRf0c%2FZlreHo%2Fgia%2FJyNIiJuhraiwHWbHEeggOSmkj0OOAq0ieeg96%2FfeidpjZaGIZNCJJ6FXMpzSIGv0dYYKDZdni4jm3b9sdnCqYw37X8vGUbLey%2FG4rSyyVtNqDuyVl5FHTZb45XAtMkkyWu7tlPH3%2BOVriXQQ0J2ttpiX46U5Xr0RWZDBq5wRjBooEBtohARKM7lVpmm9xVdKjMz4Kg3Rk3TXsBMHsPwmcWZwwm7CiIDfJpxDnT1ljwYX9lT1Pk1KEEr8y7m%2BNbDa5pMLMI8KdDKVZyNlXiUaT7F9lcp%2B%2FmKaOFNW%2BwqIjIRWoOK6H9cHGT6ORs1lorZDlRZPkSlpW%2ByCA4Ia%2FDS23gYa87gKIu2Q4%2BV80Toxc%2BNjf47Y3BKDNvN1kOai7ib7aAsvsMFBV6wDHSvmy2UV9UuIe8%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

name: Christie
subject: YOU MADE HISTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team -- It's Christie here, the Executive Director of the DSCC.

Each and every one of you made history in this election. You defied political trends, defied political gravity, and defied the media naysayers who said we were going to lose -- no, **_guaranteed_** we were going to lose.

I am so grateful for every member of this team. I know how hard you worked and how much you've given over the last two years, and as a result you literally changed the normal course of history.

**Celebrate and feel proud of what we accomplished.

And then we will run the table by re-electing Sen. Warnock on December 6th in Georgia. [Pitch in right now to finish the fight and defend our Democratic Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221113-Christie-VictoryShort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221113-Christie-VictoryShort-Pros-sl1&akid=8670%2E9716520%2EPXYWZm)**

Appreciate you all,

Christie, DSCC Executive Director

subject: less than 4 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:

We're worried, friend:
**In the general election, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell held megadonor fundraisers for our opponent, Herschel Walker – a clear sign that the Republican Party is ALL IN to defeat Rev. Warnock and turn Georgia red.**
**Now, with the runoff election officially underway, Walker and the GOP are gearing up to blanket the airwaves with attack ads.** Republicans will spend millions to try to crush our people-powered movement.
With experts saying this race is NECK AND NECK, the GOP’s surge in spending could put this seat at serious risk.

**That's why we simply can't afford to fall short of today's fundraising goal. So please, friend – with time running out, we need folks like you to rush your support so that we have the resources we need to take on the GOP and WIN.**

**[Rush $5 or more right now to help us hit our fundraising goal and defeat Herschel Walker in Georgia.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54564732/378945120/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4870-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWFlNTc1ZS1jZDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDKesJ-akUrWEvrA8mG1JK2ykoLS8W3vT3N7NcbEx_U=) **

---
| | Nov 10th, 2022. Honolulu, HI
The results are final: Conservative candidates win key victories in targeted races.
Hawaiʻi Conservatives, a new Super PAC, invested heavily into its endorsed races, crafting videos and ads that reached thousands of voters in each targeted district. Many voters were reached multiple times through texting and digital campaigns. Tim Dalhouse, Chairman of Hawaiʻi Conservatives, is ecstatic about the gains made by endorsed candidates, “Our candidates ran solid campaigns and were rewarded with solid results.” Dalhouse congratulates endorsed candidates, saying, “You did what you needed to do.” Joel Borgquist, Hawaiʻi Conservatives’ CEO, echoes Dalhouse’s enthusiasm: “We made a huge impact. We had the right focus and put the resources where they needed to go. Every campaign we invested in outperformed the field, even in their losses.”
---

Honolulu, HI The results are final: Conservative candidates win key victories in targeted races. Hawaiʻi Conservatives, a new Super PAC, invested heavily into its endorsed races, crafting videos and ads that reached thousands of voters in each targeted district. Many voters were reached multiple times through texting and digital campaigns. Tim Dalhouse, Chairman of Hawaiʻi Conservatives, is ecstatic about the gains made by endorsed candidates, “Our candidates ran solid campaigns and were rewarded with solid results.” Dalhouse congratulates endorsed candidates, saying, “You did what you needed to do.” Joel Borgquist, Hawaiʻi Conservatives’ CEO, echoes Dalhouse’s enthusiasm: “We made a huge impact. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they're doing to our kids?
body:
| | | Dear Peter, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That 's why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863034:6Y-S9LG-N:m:1:3331421248:72E58CD085F66BF4006009A36DBF46F4:r) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** 's great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted"****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They're not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They're not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863034:6Y-S9LG-N:m:1:3331421248:72E58CD085F66BF4006009A36DBF46F4:r) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863034:6Y-S9LG-N:m:1:3331421248:72E58CD085F66BF4006009A36DBF46F4:r) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863034:6Y-S9LG-N:m:1:3331421248:72E58CD085F66BF4006009A36DBF46F4:r) We're ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can't do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped - and making the schools and individual "teachers" pay is the only way! That's why I'm asking you to join our critical lawsuit today. [**Please, follow this link to make your****best tax-deductible donation of $20,****$35, $50, $100, $250 or more.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863034:6Y-S9LG-N:m:1:3331421248:72E58CD085F66BF4006009A36DBF46F4:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0004%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=G3NK6xJTuIrMwfc%2bWxNIqQ&sysid=1)
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

body:

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863304:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863305:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863306:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863307:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863304:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863304:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863304:JJ5mtLGNk:m:1:3317145305:6366077D9BBC1A24C22CA1434B78667F:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ftdnjc18dd70mad4rj6i9ajoimm2t58e86hhlg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv3hqug4mpsl6ijdkhd3j2qfqhv2vobc9psgc3eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znt2bol0pm0fl4njv2erg287ffcqjkd52snt0n38_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgpcst5qctdc7bgsom3etuo1pc7km1k7mmgotpn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4jpusuf2l810b9l1c84poq1h46hkr11rut1faeg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztmggvik0odp9v23sksd23pvvmduqbihh3uueos8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv5icbplsvrbg8qjp7tfkb5utu64v4tlm33hen3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfheqrdiklsvgjcdjt8nvkrq822vt8p5g8kgs2so_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)

Herschel Walker

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zchs503ugvs5odjcutcqii7bf26o79hgbjidi970_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z16dj0hbohs51o0m4aspvev90elvb6kr4cooam78_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr18bdgtl7n03h7eaokj0dnpsvud3hm8skci8oi0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3hgtctndhcoagk4rq6aoe17dba9hkup19fu20r8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor6c9h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlrtnirffabu30h1hpr67ofjob0slsdml8kla73g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor7cph2bs) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zje8cgi1m436nuu0q35kofol66mr87ecfao97k80_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor7cph2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0qp86gnvj5gb5ukl0udv0endkcv499mv18dmqo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor7c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zno5suieeavdhl8gpcui19qukvncvp8j3ulodn60_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor7c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqbgv01giev9g4go2ubo7emono6frhhen5eliv48_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h6cor7c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.

Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6302%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=tU8Bupvf0dRUbwqZ%2f2JinQ&sysid=1)
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z75sk09kn08kot5nsbv4i4p4ho93bm955prteae0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttim3gbccdi6crr9obmmhprep3hc1jm9ddi6pq75chhe4oe9dj2e9p68cbk6errfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup70pjlc2pm4o3i65j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5js74js4947kll6p5tarp0tf1nsbnd0s00i57o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk731vfk33a6eoogg8gh57oud84blm8nc5vh4qg0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv500hpd2fnv8an1r0rkht12kt4tbo436id045hg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvsj2pi07n0junare66crjeig7f3ar1cnvkok3eg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za6i0ca8ea8p0ih1clh144ib57ktkv0tp4oovn6g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7i3nmbgjaogvo3r22k31sca4s23tcdo500kdf0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlhlmnpprckm32hfap03g6tdkeepfe79a6b7j0c8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5h62pb4cth2bs)

Herschel Walker

name: The Doug Collins Podcast
subject: Your gift will save preborn babies
body:
| | This is a special message brought to you by The Doug Collins Podcast - This is a special message brought to you by The Doug Collins Podcast
---
Having trouble viewing this email? [View the web version.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=wdgvwvvdv&r=kfmssrrmrhmp&s=ymfvkgppkwfwwtpffzscwykbgyywlgztylf&q=1668430800&a=view)
Brought to you by
|
---
Occasional messages from sponsors allows us to provide our content at no cost to you. This message reflects the opinions of the advertiser alone, and not necessarily the opinion or editorial position of Salem Media Group.
Just $60 will save the life of a preborn baby
| |
---
| | **If you only have a minute, please read this!**
---
| | Here’s a quick update from Jim Daly, President of Focus on the Family, about how you can save precious, innocent preborn babies . . .
---
* In the coming weeks, thousands of confused, fearful women will face the most terrifying decision imaginable: whether to choose life for their unborn baby.
* That’s why Focus on the Family is working hard to reach them with “proof of life” — the truth about the precious life that grows within them.
* **Right now, just $60 can save the life of a preborn baby!**

---
---
**Give now to save a life!**
---
[**MAKE A GIFT TO SAVE A LIFE!**](http://click1.srnemail.com/uhwcnfzznjgsjjkzsggdhsmjvnspfvvjqfdkvqgwhfqfhm_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html)
---
| | Hello, They say a picture is worth a thousand words. As you can see in the ultrasound image just below, every one of those words reveals the miracle of a growing life in the womb. **Today I’m concerned about doing everything we can to ensure every woman facing an unplanned pregnancy has the chance to see that picture — and consider those words.** That’s why I’m emailing you, in the belief you’re someone who stands strongly for the sanctity of human life and would be eager to save the life of a vulnerable preborn baby.
---
[](http://click1.srnemail.com/bplzgqssgnjynnmsyjjtpybnvgycqvvnlqtmvljfpqlqpz_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html)
---
_**Worth a thousand words: Ultrasound image of Marta’s preborn baby**_
---
Did you know that a woman considering abortion is much more likely to choose life **_if she is given the chance to see an ultrasound image of her child?_** That’s how it was for Marta. She remembers, “The moment I saw that heartbeat changed everything. That was life. That sonograph made it real . . . my daughter was there.” **Can YOU see it in the image above?!** **That’s actually Marta’s baby!** It’s amazing what hearing and seeing that precious life can do to an abortion-determined woman. No wonder Focus on the Family is committed to making ultrasounds available as many women seeking abortions as possible. **Your support means more women will see and hear the truth:_What's growing within you is a precious child, deserving of life._** [Right now, just $60 can save the life of a preborn baby like Marta’s through Focus on the Family’s _Option Ultrasound_ program.](http://click1.srnemail.com/oqfqwlccwpkdppncdkkvtdmpswdrlsspzlvnszkjtlzlzf_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html) You _’_ ll not only help provide a pregnancy medical center with an ultrasound machine, sonography training for nurses and other resources — you _’_ ll also support women and their babies after the birth. **[_Please give now_.](http://click1.srnemail.com/rwllgvhhgskpssbhpkkqcpwsygptvyysrvqbyrkncvrvrc_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html)****** Your gift can save lives by protecting vulnerable moms who need care, compassion and the opportunity to see and hear the truth about the preborn lives growing within them.
Thank you!
Jim Daly
President, Focus on the Family
---
[**MAKE A GIFT TO SAVE A LIFE!**](http://click1.srnemail.com/dssjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhtmpmpp_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html)
---
| | |
---
Focus on the Family
8605 Explorer Dr., Colorado Springs, CO 80920
1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459)
---
[Link](http://click1.srnemail.com/hmhfcwllcdszddplzssgvzmdjczhwjjdqwgpjqsbvwqwqb_uqyffggwgqwcshffmgwymyy.html?a=956AA5E4-EECA-44F1-8EB5-76BBE26FCB24&b=kfmssrrmrhmp)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: $52 million has already been sent to Georgia to defeat Sen. Raphael Warnock in a runoff election next month. As the last close vote counts finish up, this must-win Senate race is the most important campaign in the nation. Can you help us hold on to this Senate seat that’s only been in Democratic hands for a year? We like Warnock’s odds, but it’s going to take a lot of support from voters like you to win.
body:
All eyes on Georgia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1dfa88b4-6a03-4bde-824a-ff94545aff86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | ** Peter,** [**They're dumping $52 million into Georgia to rob another election from the people.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43b47fa9-78f9-4cd1-bafb-ff609550900c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Senator Raphael Warnock is in a battle for reelection to be decided in a December 6th runoff.** In one fell swoop we can gain a seat in the Senate--further demoralizing MAGA Republicans--ensure we have larger majorities on committees so Republicans can't obstruct legislation there, and keep one of our best Senators in the Senate, while preventing violent lunatic, Herschel Walker, from setting up camp there. We were set to win the Ohio Senate seat in the midterms, and then **Republicans dumped $50 million on Tim Ryan, allowing the execrable J.D. Vance to buy himself a seat**. Ryan's amazing campaign did stop them from spending that money in Nevada, Arizona, Georgia and New Hampshire though, for which we should be thankful. **NOW THEY'RE TRYING IT AGAIN. Unlike Ryan, Warnock will get help from Washington, but he will need every dollar possible to fight off this onslaught from billionaire Republican oligarchs.** **[Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to win another Senate seat in Georgia and strike another blow for democracy against the authoritarian Republican Party?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T332cc91e-68ff-490e-aab4-39b26fe4f106/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you Blue Amp Action community for all you've done.** **Cliff Schecter**
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: It's official: We're going to a RUNOFF in Georgia, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
This can't wait, friend:
**We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Jacky Rosen so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54568942/378958558/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2236-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTA5MWRhOS0yNDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNAl-p_TYZDopEmLEqZ2YnKbHkVPPGc5bIf2xkLiqFk=)**
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than **$52 million** to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.
**We need to fight back ASAP , or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863096:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863097:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863098:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863095:JUN0FLGvN:m:1:3359512271:DD08C97F679DEA0094BFD943C6A8E9BD:r)

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
subject: The fight is not over yet -- I’m personally asking you to help Herschel Walker
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61864207:JcryeLGNw:m:1:3345639852:AAD426872E3D129113C36489CB20A798:r "Marsha Blackburn")
---

This is the most important email I have ever sent to you, so please take just a moment to read this email from top to bottom.

My friend, Patriot, and Conservative, Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life to save America and become the next Senator from the battleground state of Georgia.

We used every penny, nickel, and dime to run television ads before voters headed to the polls and expand Get Out The Vote efforts, **but now the race is headed to a runoff!**

_**That 's why I'm humbly asking you for your help TODAY! Can you chip in an emergency donation of just $25, $35, or $50 to help Republicans win in Georgia?**_

---
| | [EMERGENCY DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61864207:JcryeLGNw:m:1:3345639852:AAD426872E3D129113C36489CB20A798:r "EMERGENCY DONATE")

DONATE $15")
---

DONATE $25")
---

The Radical Left is deploying an army of door-knockers, phone callers, and ballot chasers on the ground.

If you're serious about saving America and putting an end to Joe Biden's radical policies, we need my friend, Herschel Walker, in the Senate.

Running ads, sending mailers, and reaching every single voter is going to take everything we have.

We need your help TODAY, or else there's no way we'll win a Republican Majority in the Senate, and all our hard work will slip right through our fingers.

**Are you willing to take that risk,**_**or can I count on your support? **_

We don't have much time left...

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5oj4aq1rf6ohq8ku9nv6m1u5tajsusidag9lj78_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5j62ob5clh2bs)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zllkig67pe3l8qscph7cece0485vlu5mk3m2sb78_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5j62ob5clh2bs)**

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cohn for Congress 2022 Cohn for Congress 2022
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54573856/378979239/-1130149750?refcode=em22_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2N2YyMGQtMmQ2NC1lZDExLWFkZTYtMTRjYjY1MzQyY2QyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=08CVXAqz2doa_mNZuFLcLcg48E9uVErTyFr9ybVQaSU=)
Hello –

I want to thank you. Not just for your generous support but also for the constant encouragement and good wishes you showed me, my family, and the tireless team we put together.

You provided me and this campaign with everything we needed.

But, as I said the other night, if you believe in a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions, you have to show up and vote. If you crave representation who has the back of hard-working families, you have to show up.

If you want representatives who believe freedom and democracy are more than words or slogans, you have to show up.

As Benjamin Franklin once said about the United States our nation is a "Republic if you can keep it."

When you have a governor releasing commercials claiming he was sent by God, then "Houston, we have a problem."

It's our responsibility to fight for our country. Democrats don't do that by storming the capitol and beating the police with the American flag. We do it by supporting candidates we believe in and causes worth fighting for more.

Patty and I will never stop fighting for you and our country because we have two beautiful children, and we want them to have a country. Tuesday night, we were surrounded by some extraordinary students from the University of South Florida who are engaged and committed to doing their part.

As President Obama once said, "A change is brought about because ordinary people do extraordinary things.

Let's be extraordinary.

Alan

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/orSvoZJrsE-sD1dJfMeWwQ2?unsubscribedata=2CXiWqO7IqCY%2B8f4WU1Z5Lr4GkBxlDk%2FRiILTHwzf7jEV6rDbBU1cW29GRAvbq07iKljG6UGtu%2FUQda8frrGRqwAyuuJ%2BIAHGsrZ830AM69QvgiB82EfhDZa%2FnmK8VLc3mhnPdZjRNMH3ztqAFLwk9ONo2gSLSroey4P0EGKlu49FT4HHOb2kjwUgaGIpGM3OIQHqQDgLlRR1%2FmfgbxSfjA7Qh4oAE1O8w4qtQ9GuJ9yt1YuoSEvVBzEY0zPv7Lduu3LHuyiJQDpmRcJnokup12ryXvox3XIAw4q6eeR9Tw6jkl3zAoukV%2BEm3yEqZ30nSNu162kHCxnNzVUtvPjG%2B%2BD%2FjEbrLCGh8EipDT4UABYf5au3HCU%2FCcXuSzRWQ%2BflDfBqczn3VXSrpsjVBpfRvyrz%2FINg%2FG8aeHSRDpgSsUVPdUselQQr8%2FBFwLfMpEX).

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: I Started My Business in My Garage
body:
| | |
---
That’s why I asked to be appointed to the Small Business Commission. I understand those sleepless nights that business owners have because I started my first business in my garage. I worked tirelessly, took risks, trained great employees. After 20 years of hard work, I had 30 employees working out of a custom-designed manufacturing facility. I know from experience how difficult it can be to start a business.
* The stress to meet payroll.
* The difficulty to hire, train, and keep employees, and provide a safe work environment.
* The challenge to exceed the expectations of every client.

That’s one of the reasons why I decided to run for Delegate. We need leadership that _understands business _in order foster a more business friendly environment. Small businesses are the backbone of Virginia’s economy. *We have nearly 800,000 small businesses in Virginia.46% of our employees work for small businesses. For our government to support and encourage these businesses, we need someone who understands the issues and can speak up! As Delegate, I am the voice of experience for our small business community. As a member of the Small Business Commission, I can raise issues of concern from my unique perspective. But I need your help. [Can you make a contribution of $250, $150 or even $50 to help send me back to Richmond to fight for small business?](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/e7a4a09f54dd42ef/07c2d6fa8bdaa8d4c3d6b838967d376c/37923) We have made huge strides to help create more family-sustaining jobs and make it easier to start and grow a company, but we can’t stop now. [With your contribution of $150, $100, or even $75 we can ensure that we have a fighter for small business in the House of Delegates.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/e7a4a09f54dd42ef/3bf1ad112cd9396ac3d6b838967d376c/37923) * [https://cdn.advocacy.sba.gov/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/30121339/Small-Business-Economic-Profile-VA.pdf](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/e7a4a09f54dd42ef/3039b98c47d30defc3d6b838967d376c/37923)
---
| | Thank you for your support, Karen **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates, 85th District** 1-804-698-1185[karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/e7a4a09f54dd42ef/12e2756d9d57cd10c3d6b838967d376c/37923)

Greenhalgh**House of Delegates, 85th District 1-804-698-1185 | | |

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
subject: The fight is not over yet -- I’m personally asking you to help Herschel Walker
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863720:JR9M4LGNv:m:1:3317145305:C20C693E95603E4A29E2E9CF7CC57EDE:r "Marsha Blackburn")
---

This is the most important email I have ever sent to you, so please take just a moment to read this email from top to bottom.

My friend, Patriot, and Conservative, Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life to save America and become the next Senator from the battleground state of Georgia.

We used every penny, nickel, and dime to run television ads before voters headed to the polls and expand Get Out The Vote efforts, **but now the race is headed to a runoff!**

_**That 's why I'm humbly asking you for your help TODAY! Can you chip in an emergency donation of just $25, $35, or $50 to help Republicans win in Georgia?**_

---
| | [EMERGENCY DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863720:JR9M4LGNv:m:1:3317145305:C20C693E95603E4A29E2E9CF7CC57EDE:r "EMERGENCY DONATE")
---
| | [EMERGENCY DONATE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863720:JR9M4LGNv:m:1:3317145305:C20C693E95603E4A29E2E9CF7CC57EDE:r "EMERGENCY
DONATE $10")
---
| | [EMERGENCY DONATE $35](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863720:JR9M4LGNv:m:1:3317145305:C20C693E95603E4A29E2E9CF7CC57EDE:r "EMERGENCY
DONATE $15")
---
| | [EMERGENCY DONATE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863720:JR9M4LGNv:m:1:3317145305:C20C693E95603E4A29E2E9CF7CC57EDE:r "EMERGENCY
DONATE $25")
---

The Radical Left is deploying an army of door-knockers, phone callers, and ballot chasers on the ground.

If you're serious about saving America and putting an end to Joe Biden's radical policies, we need my friend, Herschel Walker, in the Senate.

Running ads, sending mailers, and reaching every single voter is going to take everything we have.

We need your help TODAY, or else there's no way we'll win a Republican Majority in the Senate, and all our hard work will slip right through our fingers.

**Are you willing to take that risk,**_**or can I count on your support? **_

We don't have much time left...

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

---
|

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could – just like last election cycle – have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? | | Dear Peter, Last week was a huge deal! Thanks to your support, Pennsylvania Democrats won big on Tuesday. **Democrats won control of the Governor’s office, flipped a U.S. Senate seat from red to blue, and won back the State House. subject: December 6th

body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863120:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863121:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863122:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863119:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863123:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863124:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863125:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863126:6t0yULGNJ:m:1:3361486117:2D435B28D7CABA04380E42FAB33172F5:r)

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: RELEASE: Protect Freedom PAC Congratulates Endorsed Candidates
body:
| | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: November 14, 2022
---
| Contact: Andrew Boucher andrew@ascent-strategic.com, 970-219-2831
---
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Congratulates Endorsed Candidates
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, a Rand Paul affiliated Super PAC dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, endorsed and launched independent expenditures in approximately a dozen key House races and three pivotal Senate races this cycle. The expenditures totaled nearly $8 million.
Protect Freedom PAC congratulates the following endorsed candidates on their election to Congress:

* Senator Mike Lee (UT)
* Senator Ron Johnson (WI)
* Congressman-Elect Eli Crane (AZ-02)
* Congresswoman-Elect Harriet Hageman (WY-AL)
* Congressman-Elect Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

Mike Biundo, Protect Freedom PAC's Chairman, issued the following statement:
"We are proud to have supported these freedom fighters this cycle. They are the future of the Republican Party, and we are confident that they will stand with Senator Rand Paul and work tirelessly to protect our rights and liberties. We look forward to seeing their achievements in the coming Congress."
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Protect Freedom PAC endorses and supports candidates for statewide and federal offices and has made independent expenditures totaling approximately $20 million since 2018. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President. | | | Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul. | ### | | | | | | | | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@protectfreedompac.com powered by == ==

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITLkgZ95l2X5_J5iXa8j7XK70b65Tpo2gYuPo_moXCjWM0x6Os5I3hXd1V7jPLuU1WpU4BEQ9B8i3O2bK1vHrD1FkZFsJFVwjKtckNoiWfNugt_sD1QsntZFS_WrGMOvVXqEQF9s23mXmBEJ-BVQtYAE%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITMcImPr2OUxbvLJRYBBD-Pk37OZTLaX6DK5ktTdiTace9PIN_eq3ylSUn2ARYF7OKkkBH-8aNdo749yheEcTEJnLuvrBAg52jSzUvOUwWWVR7SIQ4R63MVAcgPQycmuRrGv5-1OYojqCZv8cikHVpco%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITFIk6trI8X3TiHMeOGAq1-TDfe9H91QyTPr8hKoVsAOGB1tHUfLcbku_S4DhmQrLwFp-8VPeiJC41hAgIH2JXAZC9ysxe3PSyPERVlFSriOdvjkg09xLKswfxjUf2HQAeYafOWJefGfHKrueVRqAF8k%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITKLkzhdsBg9HdvVTXqmEb8-OXlN3ckniyVpINlLp-p2pn5gF4PKwg-Fd_uLNP4HqoRb_LSqQsL3FFyJV-NNTwZxk8cNCgoGcbtDc2E3H3AX66_gFRKNzcG2qXbSvJjrjbFfdRQYMg_K3k1v4qA7HaJI%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITFLnQzd6PRS8tdpZumd1qzzZwdeGiP3mIDwzzbuIox89UWCV9F-oc7Zs8svsmPEKq-S04lwnmPEeH246lrz0psCK6bYyargzdGWIKv25CVaCXGmDeBw7v6qXdqtIpMMGqcvYZL_NaMlnmeS8IqaZVV4%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITE0rFTyTeC4X-J_Z1EKFwwqS71OeGR9aPTsd4OSTQOBEOLRBqYwQnWFuYxhOo1O9U9L-nxg9lVxRc6jmC_zAeQs_VOIEvCsAEB2RiOzEFc9WaHxuqkPCpyYJ68ivXLebKbPhkWiS4lTH7IWM7Fd2pEg%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITO24aV4O-HrsJ8t8GlKu93PlM92SEPDByc4Jeu78ki4QrnJzYuY0iQ6I5DqBe7DR26wsuqf4IhvPvT5pLR4VM8jYtjXbJ19MRkliGxMhXY1_ITxZNXWjDhnmQEo0ra9hGprjbcegWVHXzd2mD4dHqok%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b04865d3af5c4eac980038375ff6fc86&_e=RqEGuHAzECcfJMGjWQgqWcRklY3R4Xkzx_MxeOqyQ4uHzYLvqz2BmRDFzELIoBRHtzclO67WkS4-pn04qhpmr_f5P49fsNhVSwboXbFZ9uBt6gH1A6uM3E7RgvqtzfsKpS6r71gzzSnNgenfPUBITIw3xDnHPNMuZjatiRn6ASPMLiBUVQMrAMZnZ_RokcsWrRD3jUsfTyT0QlgXBIEcQJD2eZan3tR6sd7LKwD7sjxGEX5OJou1I2piAKbz1S8LvCdEpdykl0bHVhRG8jCJxYul4Y6e40GHaYCpTdwTO3Y%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.
