clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

---

Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? name: Pro Life Update
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z90hig4ma6qp1td6ptcc1c60lb4rvaettn6mui40_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gm6p34cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1k89la3m3bf1imtsti9uvi6e83agaobfl0cbuso_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gm6p34cdh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrfhuauq2qk3s1tp650tjnptl8meogqb7g600pt8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gmaoj6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd8nrv1qovcp597mvmnsub9b33jpsektdhef50h8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gmaoj6chh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zq1gjsna1m3aoq6lsojsj7ii3ndj5r0e6q0iea58).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Overtime in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a6af4422218d5c1b/43e603289ea5b2dac3d6b838967d376c/37973)

# **Friend — I’ll get right to it. Herschel Walker is in a runoff in Georgia, and he needs our immediate help. **

---
[**If you’re able, please send Herschel the help he needs to defeat Raphael Warnock. Rush a donation of $34, or even just $4, here — >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a6af4422218d5c1b/367a222a78c0d20dc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[**STAND WITH HERSCHEL**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a6af4422218d5c1b/1b8b449368032dabc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Democrats spent MILLIONS attacking Herschel before Election Day last week, and he STILL fought back and forced a runoff. Now, they’re doubling down — so we _must_ do the same. I was proud to endorse Herschel and to campaign with him in Georgia. We need him in the U.S. Senate — not his opponent, Raphael Warnock, who sides with Joe Biden 96% of the time. [**That’s why I’m asking every single member of Team Marshall to step up and help Herschel win this runoff. It’s critical, time is short, and no amount is too small.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a6af4422218d5c1b/a2d52044dbd40978c3d6b838967d376c/37973) Please act now if you can. There’s no time to waste.

But I can't keep up the fight without your help. It’s going to take all of us, standing together, to hold Joe Biden and the woke left accountable. I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. -Senator Roger Marshall
---
[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a6af4422218d5c1b/148d39056615375ac3d6b838967d376c/37973)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
This can't wait, friend: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.
If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Serve America so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election.
We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
Will you split $20 between me and Serve America right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for coming through when it matters most.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Could we retire Mitch McConnell by re-electing Raphael Warnock? McConnell said before this election if he didn't get a majority he'd seriously consider retirement. Standing with the Warnock campaign could put more seriousness in McConnell’s consideration. Will you join us?
body:
A good man enters, a bad man leaves?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f36d862-4cc1-4444-9faa-48a6219d8408/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---

| | | | | Peter, **[WE CAN RETIRE MITCH MCCONNELL ON DECEMBER 6TH. YOU READ THAT RIGHT, RETIRE HIM.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T464a1b4e-e1ad-4698-8703-21575656ca9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _**McConnell & Peter Thiel--weirdo billionaire obsessed with living forever, spent $50 million to prop up awful candidate and human, J.D. Vance, in Ohio. But it didn't get McConnell his white whale--a Senate majority that's ****seemingly all he lives for**** (Can't the man find a hobby??).**_ **_McConnell said before this election if he didn't get a majority he'd seriously consider retirement. Well, let's give the ole fella a push. By electing Raphael Warnock, gaining that 51st seat and putting McConnell that much further away from his dream--while Trump's antics undermine it further every day--a blow like this might just convince McConnell to walk away right now, as he said he was contemplating if he lost._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help retire Mitch McConnell**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2540760-7dc5-49c1-a18e-4ac10e416ee7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Imagine, with one election: A bigger Democratic majority, no Senator Herschel Walker, a full term for all-star-Senator-and-person, Raphael Warnock, and NO MITCH MCCONNELL. Talk about dreaming, that's a dream I can do every night._** **[Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to defend Warnock's seat and sending McConnell into a retirement he sorely deserves?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96f257a9-bab9-4a98-b9da-cba89cb491be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you for helping us end the reign of the most destructive U.S. Senator since Joseph McCarthy_**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Nov. 14th: All hands on deck in Georgia
body:
| | | |
---
---
Early voting will begin in Georgia for the runoff soon, so please see the action item below and sign up to help! And remember, the nationwide theatrical release of Innovation Race is happening this week! See below for details.
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
A Georgia senate seat is up for grabs – again – in a runoff and now instead of fighting for control of the Senate, we must fight to preserve the filibuster if we are to have any chance at stopping Biden's radical agenda from continuing to move forward. Election Day is December 6th, but early voting will start sometime soon, so there is no time to waste! You do not need to live in Georgia to help! This means you can live anywhere and help from home. Last time there was a Senate runoff in Georgia, it didn't go our way, and Biden was able to do whatever he wanted. We must do everything we can to win this seat so that we can preserve the filibuster. Anything can happen in two years. If a sitting Senator leaves office for whatever reason, we will be better off if the Senate is 50-50 rather than 51-49. If a Democrat left office in a state with a Republican governor, that governor could potentially appoint a Republican serve out the term and Republicans would take control of the chamber. _The national media will now say this race doesn't matter, but that couldn't be further from the truth!_ If you want to help immediately, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! All you have to do to begin, is go to [**tpp.me/textvoters**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMTgtNTFiODQwYjg4YWZiNDFlZmExNmIwOTUwOTZlZWRhNjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHBwLm1lL3RleHR2b3RlcnM_bWlkPTQ2MDY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/_GOjeGALws_qkLSdWnBF2A) and register. You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!” If you would like to help at the polls, **[p](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**[**lease fill out this form**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to let us know if and how you can help. The Democrats are already fundraising and recruiting volunteers from across the nation.
---
[TEXT VOTERS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | While the midterms appear to have given the Republicans a narrow majority in the House of Representatives, it will be the current Republican minority that must face down their Democrat counterparts’ efforts to ram through a [wasteful lame duck spending bill](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Sbc_A) into law before the new Congress begins on January 3. House Democrats are [rushing to pass partisan spending priorities](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-7k6vRMzNEFMe1MA) before mid-December. The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget [estimates](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that the lame duck Congress wants to drive up deficits by $555 billion in year one and by a total of $4.5 trillion over the next 10 years, amounting to $4,500 for every American household next year. Their estimates don’t even include the corresponding increase in interest rates from higher deficits.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._wqigyYgg)
---
[**Please fill out our short form**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-ZBKZ2_A) to let us know how your voting experience was this year. It’s important for us to know how things have changed from 2020 (or if they haven’t where you live), so we know what to focus on in 2023 and 2024.
---
[COMPLETE MY SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMTgtNTFiODQwYjg4YWZiNDFlZmExNmIwOTUwOTZlZWRhNjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9oZWxwYXR0aGVwb2xscy8_bWlkPTQ2MDY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/GvcF03e5_c3uZX3ZHJKRgA)
---
|
---
| | Thousands of active-duty service members and civilian workers [are being asked](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) if they feel educated enough about climate change to carry out their duties as part of the Department of Defense’s woke agenda. In their [2022 Climate Literacy Pulse Check](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), the Pentagon asked workers whether they are “integrating climate change considerations into [their] regular responsibilities.” The poll also asked workers if they have the "right amount of knowledge/information on climate change" needed to perform their jobs, and questioned what kind of climate change trainings, seminars and briefings they have received. Rep. Mike Rogers of Alabama, the top Republican on the House Armed Services Committee, said the DOD's poll is a distraction from the core mission of the U.S. Armed Forces. "The Department of Defense should not be wasting our service members’ time with surveys on climate change," he said. "The military should not be distracted from its mission of maintaining the most lethal and capable force in the world."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
One night only! On Wednesday, November 16th, our latest documentary, Innovation Race, will be in select theaters across the country. Please come out to support this incredibly important film, and to learn about the hidden and imminent threat we face from China and Big Tech. [**Check the website for cities where it is showing and to buy your tickets!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)****
---
[GET YOUR TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | A California School District [used thousands of taxpayer dollars](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._uR-HXJycQcZOrBlyn-A) to advance progressive ideas about gender identity in classrooms. Poway Unified School District (PUSD) paid $3,000 per year to the nonprofit transgender family organization, Transfamily Support Services (TFSS) to give staff trainings on “gender affirmation” within the district. The trainings are designed to educate teachers on how to "affirm" students’ feelings about their sexual identity at school, regardless of the [damaging long-term side effects](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-MZMlkYhq49vSQWojyQ2A) accompanying such “affirmation.” But some parents have major objections to such intervention by teachers. Wenyuan Wu, executive director of [Californians for Equal Rights Foundation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMTgtNTFiODQwYjg4YWZiNDFlZmExNmIwOTUwOTZlZWRhNjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTgiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2NmZXJmb3VuZGF0aW9uLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MDY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNjb250ZW50In0/i4SjKWnRtQb-cWr1pmqRew), a group that focuses on equal rights in education, explained that the trainings “[erode] the fundamental right of parents to direct their child’s upbringing. It is also a snapshot of the corrosive politicization in our public education.”
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMTgtNTFiODQwYjg4YWZiNDFlZmExNmIwOTUwOTZlZWRhNjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ2MDY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/VgqxwJ5ns9QaD2tQ-R72XQ)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar Lauren Boebert is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes - 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
You can help by supporting her recount fund today.
Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign.
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

 

LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT

Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.

DONATE NOW

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be64a8b59b384812a555c670b6004868&_e=G6FXXwmMNV-7QmSXfKCBC9y-AKqa0o3yPn0x9E_8oIDhCCFFIhc_iQcz03ApZabnOc7NwBlaHpMJ5cBiPbykpNvBGXXy6XV1N_1FuLe_8piBAuzsnODy2gf059gNrmai7LMm8qXbY4sjFFPN4mMF-Ay-oBEfaCJaQo7RAs1ZvCW23j6aAdkiNKKZWSiD2XkdKpFwT_qve5EjbAcB9bDaSiRvxo-9iJLhiB61c-CtDnau_cUlKAFC3DXDrut01O2fUTy3vMjg5h37hOG1yLgfkOMZdVd1d-7vdyE1h-J4OIsrq5CSLdW0RxVXljoKCqlVbOMzukYQMiOJBAU4cQEBODpmyI7TOAtRk4NVLzZWSs_chNWYsgfyKDowCMFXu9njMESpXrhdoGKO3Zr8VneFBinGuL3REw1GZJVF-kkPxmCPELQzfwm-kigmPOKeON61xJEkEaarBzFLTrCc_oIWJCBxi0M0BfkNTAg13aTzmJoMkXqH6N5_JDsls8OMFDMT) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. name: Great America Update
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7579%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=qtF8qQV1Wr55Sg8hv3IToA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cULIkJc%2fJWC68qG47ca32w&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77195%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sSZzpa5FiCoCEYGNegmeCg&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” | | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife. Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course. “Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia “The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado “It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29. Reserve your spot here: I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith. Warm Regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are angels fact or fantasy?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hbmdlbHNfYW5kX2RlbW9ucyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTExNDIwMjIifQ/W3sGV_SxA6x4GiKx8lxnUA)
---
Hello Friend,Have you ever read a passage in the New Testament and wondered if you'd stumbled across a scene from a horror movie?Stories like the one about a man possessed by a legion of demons who terrorized an entire town are hard to forget and force us to ask difficult questions.Are angels and demons real? If so, can they impact your life?Christians for centuries have wrestled with questions about demonic activity and angelic intervention like the kind we read of in the Bible. You may have heard stories about such activities or even witnessed things that seemed to have been the result of some kind of spiritual "force" working behind the scenes.As Christians, It can be hard to know what is biblically true about supernatural activity and what is just Hollywood-inspired hyperbole.**[That's why I want you to have _Angels & Demons: Fact vs. Fantasy_.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hbmdlbHNfYW5kX2RlbW9ucyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTExNDIwMjIifQ/Oz9tus-i0iguLjlpKJpC6Q)** This free resource from _Pathway to Victory, summarizes bold_ , biblical facts from past messages I've written about angels and demons.
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hbmdlbHNfYW5kX2RlbW9ucyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTExNDIwMjIifQ/0tic0AF8NwW0HthaywTUSQ)
---
| | Jesus Christ doesn't want us to fear demons or worship angels. I know that this eBook will help you better understand the supernatural world that surrounds us and God's will for you in it.You can get your copy at this link: **[https://ptv.org/nna/angels-demons-fact-vs-fantasy-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hbmdlbHNfYW5kX2RlbW9ucyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTExNDIwMjIifQ/LtF_wwJHSETRVCDj5k0fzw)** Let's not be afraid of the supernatural. I hope these resources give you the knowledge you need to better understand the entirety of God's Word. to Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

| Fellow activist, can you help send NPP to Georgia this month?

We succeeded beyond all expectations in Pennsylvania’s elections this year.

We defended our democracy, elected a crucial progressive U.S. Senator, and even flipped Pennsylvania’s House for the first time in over a decade.

So with the news that Georgia’s election for a 51st Democratic voice in the Senate depends on an extremely competitive runoff election, our choice is clear — we’re going to back up our allies in Georgia.

**[Please make a donation to help New Pennsylvania Project staff members add capacity to the on the ground efforts and get out the vote for the Warnock/Walker runoff election in Georgia. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: My dad used to wake me up at 6 a.m. each morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

My dad used to wake me up at 6 a.m. each morning and say, "Put your shoes on, son. Get ready. There's something for you to do."
He was many things throughout his life: a veteran, a small businessman, and a preacher. He spent his days fixing junk cars that other folks had discarded – and then on Sundays, he preached to folks who felt discarded.
One of my last memories of my dad was calling him the day Barack Obama was inaugurated as the 44th president of the United States. I heard the pride and joy in his voice – the ways in which he saw the arc of history bending a little closer toward justice. Two years later, my dad was gone. As the senior pastor at Dr. King's church, I had the sad duty and honor of eulogizing him.

My father taught me so much – from the meaning of hard work to the value of serving others – and I bring these lessons with me wherever I go, including to the U.S. Senate. He's a big reason why I'm in this fight to build a better, brighter future for all people, not just the lucky few.
**But keeping up this fight in Washington won't be easy: Experts are predicting an incredibly close runoff election, and the GOP is spending millions to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and defend my critical seat is if folks like you chip in now. **

[**That's why I'm personally asking, friend: Will you give $5 or more right now to help me keep Georgia blue and build a better future for our country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54568025/378954225/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4442-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYjBmYy0xYzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNifpcQG_CoxLsyTivr9gz_Qjs04hjVdlgH2aGdvE5w=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54568026/378954226/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4442-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYjBmYy0xYzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNifpcQG_CoxLsyTivr9gz_Qjs04hjVdlgH2aGdvE5w=)
_A photo of Dad and me. I was so lucky to have him in my life._
Thank you for all of your support, friend.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54568027/378954227/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4442-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVmYjBmYy0xYzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNifpcQG_CoxLsyTivr9gz_Qjs04hjVdlgH2aGdvE5w=)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869293:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869294:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869293:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869294:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869293:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869293:JkZ_gLGbN:m:1:3373497171:C8E1372ECDF8DD3C30CE61DA961432CA:r)**

Thanks,

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Raphael Warnock is winning 🤯
body:
| |
---
| | | It's Senator Marsha Blackburn.

I don't reach out to you often, so you _**know**_ this is important.

As I'm sure you know by now, Herschel Walker will face radical Democrat Raphael Warnock in a must-win for Republicans Georgia runoff.

Raphael Warnock has the backing of liberal elites nationwide that are hell-bent on securing the 51st seat for Democrats in the Senate.

They need Warnock to win in order to greenlight their liberal wishlist.

Defunding the police, gutting voter ID, codifying Roe into law, and more will be on the table if Raphael Warnock is victorious.

Herschel Walker is our ONLY chance at stopping the liberal agenda from becoming a reality, and he's counting on the support of grassroots Republicans like YOU right now!

His campaign is barely keeping up with the onslaught from the radical Left. Herschel's team is being forced to use every resource available, _**[so believe me when I say your support will make a difference.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868218:6JsLjrGWN:m:1:3317145305:F6F44F4864CE8BAE17E4089551DF660D:r "so believe me when I say your
support will make a difference.")**_

Due to the severity of this election for Republicans, I've been authorized to unlock 500% matching for the next 45 minutes. This means your support of $25, $35, or even $50 will have 5 TIMES the impact on Herschel Walker's chances in the upcoming runoff.
_**[<< RUSH 500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868218:6JsLjrGWN:m:1:3317145305:F6F44F4864CE8BAE17E4089551DF660D:r "<< RUSH
500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>")**_
_**[Can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868218:6JsLjrGWN:m:1:3317145305:F6F44F4864CE8BAE17E4089551DF660D:r "Peter, can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?")**_

When push comes to shove, our America First movement is made up of grassroots supporters like you who are standing at the ready to defend our values.

_**Democrats are mobilizing historic numbers of donors to flood cash into Georgia. And to be frank, if we don 't respond in kind, we will be blown out of the water. **_

This is our final chance to secure a seat for Republicans in the Senate. _**[Please step up to ensure Raphael Warnock is defeated.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868218:6JsLjrGWN:m:1:3317145305:F6F44F4864CE8BAE17E4089551DF660D:r "Please step up to ensure Raphael
Warnock is defeated.")**_

Thank you,

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tamie Wilson For US**
body:
I have great news to share with you!!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54586195/379024985/295253583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIyYjNiMTMtNGI2NC1lZDExLWFkZTYtMTRjYjY1MzQyY2QyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=faetGTFzrng-yMKXj0pya9WFV3FYnu5bG9pudXTWxKM=)
Team,

Thank you so much for supporting my campaign. I have great news! I was right on target with my messaging and strategy. Unfortunately, Jim Jordan used my strategy to win. Had I had more money, I could have reached more people and flipped the district, that is a fact!

I am running again to unseat Jim Jordan and I’m starting now. I am so excited, and I want you to be too!! I learned a lot from my first run. I had the winning strategy; I just didn’t have the support nor resources to pull it off. Well, things are different this time. I have built great relationships with community groups and leaders. I have a great foundation to build upon. I know exactly what needs to be done, how to do it, and when.

1. We still need more women in DC. I have the momentum, drive, following, and determination to keep going and win.

[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54586196/379024986/295253583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIyYjNiMTMtNGI2NC1lZDExLWFkZTYtMTRjYjY1MzQyY2QyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=faetGTFzrng-yMKXj0pya9WFV3FYnu5bG9pudXTWxKM=)
I learned a lot on the campaign trail. I was surprised to learn there were a lot of people that didn’t know Jim Jordan and some people didn’t know Jordan was their Representative. That taught me, there were a lot of uninformed voters out there. Of course, our Ohio legislature didn’t help by changing the maps multiple times right before the election, so naturally, by design, there were a lot of confused voters. I was in the press a little, but not as much as needed to win. I was also surprised by the fact that out of all the people I spoke to who knew who he was, most people hated Jim Jordan and were anxious to get rid of him. I had a universal moderate message that was appealing to the masses. Bottom line, I just needed to reach more people.
**[Team, we can't let Jim Jordan continue to corrupt our governement. Will you donate $25 right now to help me kick this phony out of Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54586197/379024987/295253583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIyYjNiMTMtNGI2NC1lZDExLWFkZTYtMTRjYjY1MzQyY2QyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=faetGTFzrng-yMKXj0pya9WFV3FYnu5bG9pudXTWxKM=)**
I am asking for your support and commitment to stick with me this go around, and help me win. We must take out this MAGA maniac. We have several things in our favor, and the facts haven’t changed:

1. Jim Jordan is and will remain a national threat to the United States. Someone must take him out and I am the woman to do it.
2. Democratic women have won the primary for the past 10 years. I am already strategizing and strengthening my coalition, so I am better equipped and prepared this time.
3. We will have new maps this time around as the last map drawn was deemed un-Constitutional.
4. George Clooney’s documentary about Jim Jordan’s involvement in the OSU sexual abuse scandal will be out and told by the survivors, so there will be no denying what he did and didn’t do to protect those students.

clean_body: I have great news to share with you!! = Team, Thank you so much for supporting my campaign. I have great news! I was right on target with my messaging and strategy. Unfortunately, Jim Jordan used my strategy to win. Had I had more money, I could have reached more people and flipped the district, that is a fact! I am running again to unseat Jim Jordan and I’m starting now. I am so excited, and I want you to be too!! I learned a lot from my first run. I had the winning strategy; I just didn’t have the support nor resources to pull it off. Well, things are different this time. I have built great relationships with community groups and leaders. I have a great foundation to build upon. I know exactly what needs to be done, how to do it, and when. 1. We still need more women in DC. I have the momentum, drive, following, and determination to keep going and win. = I learned a lot on the campaign trail. I was surprised to learn there were a lot of people that didn’t know Jim Jordan and some people didn’t know Jordan was their Representative. That taught me, there were a lot of uninformed voters out there. Of course, our Ohio legislature didn’t help by changing the maps multiple times right before the election, so naturally, by design, there were a lot of confused voters. I was in the press a little, but not as much as needed to win. I was also surprised by the fact that out of all the people I spoke to who knew who he was, most people hated Jim Jordan and were anxious to get rid of him. I had a universal moderate message that was appealing to the masses. Bottom line, I just needed to reach more people. = I am asking for your support and commitment to stick with me this go around, and help me win. We must take out this MAGA maniac. We have several things in our favor, and the facts haven’t changed: 1. Jim Jordan is and will remain a national threat to the United States. Someone must take him out and I am the woman to do it. 2. Democratic women have won the primary for the past 10 years. I am already strategizing and strengthening my coalition, so I am better equipped and prepared this time. 3. We will have new maps this time around as the last map drawn was deemed un-Constitutional. 4. George Clooney’s documentary about Jim Jordan’s involvement in the OSU sexual abuse scandal will be out and told by the survivors, so there will be no denying what he did and didn’t do to protect those students. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Together, we can eliminate Jim Jordan from Congress once and for all! \- Tamie Wilson = || || || Tamie Wilson For US 18 North Sandusky Street Delaware, OH 43015 United States ** | Paid For By Tamie Wilson For US

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf09rud8l05g4bjr9qrgnvpnudrav5dom8jqp2eg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im0pj6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe8dr16eqn8dllelqmacj369q66clgm3hm7dtl6hgm1o3mm1pb6d32m1i75chgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie1j7ap5lm1g75cr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf5hdhrdefub47cg9kamlo9lufohnktnoova9220_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im0pj6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrje1koq63u9ujmuc850p4tnhkcikhalh932670o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im0pj6clh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z01r98u18gviro9qtvvam5kdnntm3k3ps6vu30i8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gm9pr4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uop68c5gciq60p71csqrbdpmm4or1dbmcdhn6slks3ie3cb7m9rr1oj0stir4dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjgcpqmeddks1p72phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0sak42o873e34a6v7reqlmkqbt13j0vci2f1i3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gm9pr4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zftlgt3a7g27s901ekmnoup6ppcbedjjjq2tuo38_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5gm9pr4c9h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We won the Senate - but we’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need your help to finish the job.
#
Peter,
It’s official: Democrats have held the Senate majority.
But we’re not done yet. We still have an upcoming runoff election in Georgia and it’s crucial that we re-elect my colleague Reverend Raphael Warnock. I’m asking this team to stay in the fight a bit longer.
**[We’ve asked a lot this year, but we need your help to finish the job. Contribute to Raphael Warnock right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54587923/379026365/-473415286?refcode=dd_em_221114_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzNmODA2YS00ZTY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NkB9K3mWpoNnYqhrHJ6sv1LrAHNesIagCwBWpUmdj4=)**

We should absolutely celebrate these wins — but we can’t slow down our efforts with a Senate seat still up for grabs.

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869891:Jd1TNrGN6:m:1:3374012347:3E2C92DDF40E4745235A11A12EE54958:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869891:Jd1TNrGN6:m:1:3374012347:3E2C92DDF40E4745235A11A12EE54958:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869891:Jd1TNrGN6:m:1:3374012347:3E2C92DDF40E4745235A11A12EE54958:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869891:Jd1TNrGN6:m:1:3374012347:3E2C92DDF40E4745235A11A12EE54958:r)**

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88c1e07e8b0347df9fed993ca5786151&_e=_4uGLJRL1lC3ryTTpxz4-zzGDBkbuVGOn01axBHBStqWV1FR6NM-pQ__5OtBJnzyFTp50K0-UL4WEbNXknxuI9XlxauQxQ4JeKDKZ1fOtd0aQVJgKkU7tWGceUQtxbwGbwvt-2SYrVo-nG56dKsWzZ71MgTVKNTAFJQ39Tc4bBvNUrRdF2ghwnX2q1Oxt9Fn5MkCUe8bJF_uR2QCTqYM0F9nUkn1daLeDV1JBTbdDo3omrwQr4fGVl5CJQkZkTv8tqFhFQRHmMFv7HaDMQGaQj5Ro2nrSArWbISI5nd0jjOjzaltgo2DeMpNMRJbb_J8SpXoYoalfv1-RWfmmNLJHy_BSZngSzg3UwF6TPSEHKscLfgBiSJ5tvWimTdnugs48V75ETVjLVyiVm_Uz7cjwQEnxTGs1vX9yvEmbJg10EM18P8RIwwWrPleybrvitvuNpvPJtqxCv4TAR2v1iUvNPxjXwgjiFILJ-oHOC2pJVY%3D) **

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88c1e07e8b0347df9fed993ca5786151&_e=_4uGLJRL1lC3ryTTpxz4-zzGDBkbuVGOn01axBHBStqWV1FR6NM-pQ__5OtBJnzyFTp50K0-UL4WEbNXknxuI9XlxauQxQ4JeKDKZ1fOtd0aQVJgKkU7tWGceUQtxbwGbwvt-2SYrVo-nG56dKsWzZ71MgTVKNTAFJQ39Tc4bBvNUrRdF2ghwnX2q1Oxt9Fn5MkCUe8bJF_uR2QCTqYM0F9nUkn1daLeDV1JBTbdDo3omrwQr4fGVl5CJQkZkTv8tqFhFQRHmMFv7HaDMQGaQj5Ro2nrSArWbISI5nd0jjOjzaltgo2DeMpNMRJbb_J8rs7ebI7rD1WXVEdxv1QqIJRFGGZdwBXaVDTgZVqv5fMh-0i4yp989PkIBJKm86SC3yPuMcxCCPO2oeVeFAzkPzbDMyH-MkGjGMAJh_sZxC4jIq3jUgAdBwtHC_S_tAXUwqmkUy0lVuboNEeEdFQbmZycT5cyWdwRrj3LaIJb0Wk%3D)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88c1e07e8b0347df9fed993ca5786151&_e=_4uGLJRL1lC3ryTTpxz4-zzGDBkbuVGOn01axBHBStqWV1FR6NM-pQ__5OtBJnzyFTp50K0-UL4WEbNXknxuI9XlxauQxQ4JeKDKZ1fOtd0aQVJgKkU7tWGceUQtxbwGbwvt-2SYrVo-nG56dKsWzZ71MgTVKNTAFJQ39Tc4bBvNUrRdF2ghwnX2q1Oxt9Fn5MkCUe8bJF_uR2QCTqYM0F9nUkn1daLeDV1JBTbdDo3omrwQr4fGVl5CJQkZkTv8tqFhFQRHmMFv7HaDMQGaQj5Ro2nrSArWbISI5nd0jjOjzaltgo2DeMpNMRJbb_J8XM7Kz28uZW_DCN06zLaxnp3z0Kl_EGhw-z33rlKc0wSSy8BcC49pA4YMoZMxU3GoCNQv-cAvpxiqXMNyOnHpCE6G58fbQrGKgdupvkIKtDH6Fm7tgzzbBqgs-dJIXRKhH93xwlj9s_xVB2IgSUKIJz409kZYN_eydZFE3iT0WsU%3D)**

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: How you can stop radicals from taking over
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867509:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)

Peter,

The Radical Left isn't just taking over our schools with their woke, Marxist ideas. They are taking hold of the media, corporations, Big Tech companies, and every other aspect of American life.

**So how can you stop them?**

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF).

**America 's Future is a counter-force to these young radical leftists. We are training our own liberty-loving activists to combat Antifa and BLM.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer the rising generations opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

**We recently graduated 6 activists through our GO Fellowship to counter woke leftists!** During this 12-week program, community organizers train young activists on how to win on the grassroots level.

They leave this change-making program with the skills, relationships, and strategic plans needed to launch their own organizing project and start making a difference in their town.

Peter, to help support our Go Fellowship, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of the month.

[_**I invite you to partner with America 's Future today. Your gift of $25, $35, $50, or even $100 will have a huge impact on the next generation. Click here to give >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867509:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists.**

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.**

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

**Peter, help us empowers liberty activists through our Go Fellowship program. **

Click below to help us raise $25,000 before the end of the month.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867510:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867511:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867512:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867513:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867514:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867515:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867516:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867509:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)

We're working toward a time in America where young people collaborate to drive change in their communities - change that equips the individual to build a free and happy life.

**Your support helps young professionals collaborate with like-minded individuals and apply their skills to drive change toward a freer society. **

AF has created a growing national network of young professionals who advocate for freedom, personal responsibility, and a bright future for all.

[_**Now I 'm asking you, Peter, to get involved. **__**All you have to do is give**_ _**$25, $35, $50, or any amount today to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867509:JZtbNrGcN:m:1:3331421248:C4C7593A4E7EDCCF5EB26F41932B9581:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

Since 1995, America's Future has been the premier nationwide network of liberty-minded young leaders, providing unique opportunities to learn the ideas of liberty and develop the skills necessary to articulate them.

| | | Dear Friend \--

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40656%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U0IR5yqsV2fuRSt7Cr%2fnDg&sysid=1)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40657%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=icIGuktNx92P7kieABS%2bAg&sysid=1) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CfPKfqxUVtyhoSbsVMMLlQ&sysid=1). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ee3vJUqhNM2Yjt6%2f9ONgDg&sysid=1 "URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>")

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40654%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2dwBe02cQkn5J8wxIHyUIw&sysid=1).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40665%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gRUcxixx9slosdigfYy7rA&sysid=1) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40666%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yihplfK7tepx6cpXcyPCKg&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869620:6pFZNrGN-:m:1:3345639852:B7A9F9418D6DD02EE32F7478026E4946:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869620:6pFZNrGN-:m:1:3345639852:B7A9F9418D6DD02EE32F7478026E4946:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869620:6pFZNrGN-:m:1:3345639852:B7A9F9418D6DD02EE32F7478026E4946:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869620:6pFZNrGN-:m:1:3345639852:B7A9F9418D6DD02EE32F7478026E4946:r)**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z75mt1mooo12b9fr40l48u3p0nqukv23rgsj4240_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im0or2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znu57hhvqa0411i95mb1846c2ti6ljsfkne0s5q8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im0or2c3h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Action News
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zge2t6iuhcq7qiuikg14sv83208oponvul6tdhdg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im4ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcbtf3filqe434gdfkp7to9q0en352hhj86t488_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im4ob6cdh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
