name: Josh Shapiro, Governor-Elect
subject: What we’ve saved
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Now that we’ve won this race, Pennsylvanians know that our freedoms and our rights will remain protected. And in the Governor’s office, we can do even more to help all families thrive in this great Commonwealth.

Derek, let’s take a moment to reflect on everything that we have _saved_ in Pennsylvania and everything we can _do_ for Pennsylvanians. Now that we’ve won this race, Pennsylvanians know that our freedoms and our rights will remain protected. And in the Governor’s office, we can do even more to help all families thrive in this great Commonwealth Here’s just a brief look at everything we’ve saved — and what more we can work to do – now that we’ve won this race:
* Keep abortion safe, legal, and accessible
* Protect access to the ballot box, and expand opportunities to vote
* Defend the right to marry who you love
* Help lower costs by protecting consumers and putting money back in Pennsylvanians’ pockets
* Raise the minimum wage to $15/hour
* Protect the union way of life and create more high-paying jobs
* Appoint a Secretary of State who will ensure that elections are fair and that our democracy remains strong
* Fully fund our schools, end our reliance on standardized testing, and put a mental health counselor in every school building
* Invest in apprenticeships and vocational training and remove the college degree requirement for thousands of state government jobs
* Make sure that Pennsylvanians both feel and are safe in their communities by closing the ghost gun loophole and hiring 2,000 more police officers
* Safeguard our planet and invest in clean energy
* And so much more!

Great schools, safe communities, an economy that works for all – that is my vision for Pennsylvania’s future, and I know we can accomplish it, together. But our work doesn’t end right now with this victory — it’s only just beginning. And so I ask all of you here and all of you watching at home, to step up together and continue to meet this moment and do the work we must do to move our Commonwealth forward. Pennsylvania, you showed up for me. We came together and won this race to define our future. Now, I will continue to show up. I will continue to listen. **I will continue to bust my ass for you and together – we are going to build a better future for all 13 million Pennsylvanians.** Thank you so much, Josh Shapiro
_Governor-Elect of Pennsylvania_ __ __ __ __ __ __

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Herschel is ready to go into overtime, but he needs you on his team. |
Fellow American - **Herschel Walker knows what it's like to go into overtime.**

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.

Millions more will be spent to hold this seat for Raphael Warnock on top of the $101 million he's already raised from liberal donors all over the country.

**[Please see Herschel's email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)**

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

* * *

**From:** Herschel Walker
**Date:** Wednesday, November 9, 2022 at 7:12 AM
**Subject:** OVERTIME
---

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)
[** RUSH $5 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117002:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)
[** RUSH $10 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117003:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)
[** RUSH $34 -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117004:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117001:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117005:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117005:sL0i0sDNg:m:1:877327319:750443BE003C14518EDC03B449E300F9:r)

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgf1k88bp9f80oq5fo6n76mhrpb4esep3um797dg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5cs74adq4spc657j2hosa827rqs9dj9712utaug_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97je7mneuqbd4svnrvmldnui1ar3s43ejvbp2s0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvuio39dpc6afb38mv7eg8mkmjk5j9lohhu8tn20_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd6cc6svbakvi1vq0u53g91ka77cp6fkvst5v9qo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfvivvihdh81jl532tkdo6b341d43n1ag4fb6u6o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6cdh2bs)

Lauren Boebert

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsahthkt2vo9ejsf9qvonn8a0mmdbss51g92lk3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsf8k4qthld19ng58u2ikk6991vscs1mfsh3rg88_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs)
---
|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5f4amk2htbotrnr5t66jgun0bma96cnit8aucqo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfmrohqsoevevjl6j2kk8rcqk7q6s52m73oq0sp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8htta0no4m8fe7d6l8mt060k5oplnu3q8bldiho_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z598l7766qg7r99363jqeo0qif5u7jjl0oq6fpho_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $10")

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zna01ues0832c7l1h7m7akevaouqge3cfunqhb7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $250")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za38bc292r9litkbpd7maarub8soadhuvg6h3ji0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z02t9kj24064b6ahfcknt85l0442fduhk1kea078_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zir8mucj2ej3ivj84qkq7q5qepko1lav5v7uh068_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im2oj4cdh2bs)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Eleven years for defending life
body:
On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speake
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zksj2i2n0ik1jvvedgjakbhnkjr7judagnoks3dg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8o5gcljm8t5hmkqjfdhks1i3eo9ke1pj2orjcopjdcbl6cr32dpgmiqeep3lcurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9o6ctb4mmr30sljcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm1ob5cpj6co724no)
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zleucvom8h1c9b1gchn5c1itgkk4hdrcgktahfm8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic “escort” verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I’ll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfgjcsiulgqadof4i3kae9kkj39lev5f07hhag40_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs) Now, I’ll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act – a law that dates back to Bill Clinton’s pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark’s arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled “NOT GUILTY!” to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That’s why I’m asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That’s why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** “ _We can get to you. We can get to your family._ ”That’s their message. That’s the “street justice” they’re looking to inflict.And it’s that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won’t be easy. And it won’t be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1fl6bsoe48nphicn778n4spsi9s0ull9143sngo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general’s office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more – say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more – it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don’t have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from “Lady Justice” then the weaponization and the attacks won’t stop, _they’ll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcif7jb728ei1je6g2eh8utsdrfs46dvp6kn486g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs), before it’s too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7qhdhfk439jf3cfqsps8pv56fbt9i10csgq618g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs)
---
P.S. There’s one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that’s why he was targeted. He doesn’t just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That’s why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). [**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjmnmksj94c5a1uql2j833ca6nlmrb4h7nfvbl20_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm9suk00psftndip1uh36qdrsf7rhkm430mpgjlo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8meig6uut91lmu44il0it5vc6tml9bck7e81mn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96hc44lim6v2kt53vesn9gri9h6d3ek23nd3jgo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imcpj6c3h2bs)
---

body:
The hard work is just starting.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867619:JUQvsrGNn:m:1:3368395361:61E168E736A442E3E47E27C5F3284093:r "Headline") Peter: We did it! I won re-election to Congress with over 65% of the vote despite the tens of millions spent by the leftists and RINOs who sought various means to defeat me. While we can celebrate how Freedom won out over Socialism, let me tell you, the fight has only just begun so please don't celebrate for too long. The hard work is just starting. Leftists now realize that I'll finally get to investigate Hunter's laptop and reverse the damage Brandon helped them do to our nation. That's making them more determined than ever to kick me out of Congress. That's why I desperately need your help to refill my campaign coffers to fight back against these challenges they continue to put in my path. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867619:JUQvsrGNn:m:1:3368395361:61E168E736A442E3E47E27C5F3284093:r "Can I count on you to chip in $25,
$50, or $100 today?")** Soros and his billionaire allies are buoyed by their successes in stunting the Red Wave. Now they have their sights on me, the America First champion, standing in their way of a total Marxist takeover of America. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867619:JUQvsrGNn:m:1:3368395361:61E168E736A442E3E47E27C5F3284093:r "Headline")The majority of the country has rejected Brandon and the left's socialist policies. Now it's time for us to use that mandate to reverse the damage, secure our borders, fix the economy, end the inflation and get us back on the path set by President Trump. **[Will you help me keep up the fight and fulfill my promises? I had to spend everything in order to defeat my Leftist opponent and need your $50, $100, or $250 donation to fight on!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867619:JUQvsrGNn:m:1:3368395361:61E168E736A442E3E47E27C5F3284093:r "Will you help me keep up the fight and
fulfill my promises? I had to spend everything in order to defeat my Leftist opponent and need your $50, $100, or $250 donation to fight on!")** Don't let my victory be for naught as the Democrats and Deep State continue their efforts to keep me from reversing the damage they've done and solidifying our Constitutional Freedoms. **[Help me continue to enforce our freedom in Washington with your donation today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61867619:JUQvsrGNn:m:1:3368395361:61E168E736A442E3E47E27C5F3284093:r "Help me continue to enforce our freedom in Washington with your
donation today!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Now it's time for us to use that mandate to reverse the damage, secure our borders, fix the economy, end the inflation and get us back on the path set by President Trump. "Will you help me keep up the fight and fulfill my promises? I had to spend everything in order to defeat my Leftist opponent and need your $50, $100, or $250 donation to fight on!" Don't let my victory be for naught as the Democrats and Deep State continue their efforts to keep me from reversing the damage they've done and solidifying our Constitutional Freedoms. I don't reach out to you often, so you _**know**_ this is important.

As I'm sure you know by now, Herschel Walker will face radical Democrat Raphael Warnock in a must-win for Republicans Georgia runoff.

Raphael Warnock has the backing of liberal elites nationwide that are hell-bent on securing the 51st seat for Democrats in the Senate.

They need Warnock to win in order to greenlight their liberal wishlist.

Defunding the police, gutting voter ID, codifying Roe into law, and more will be on the table if Raphael Warnock is victorious.

Herschel Walker is our ONLY chance at stopping the liberal agenda from becoming a reality, and he's counting on the support of grassroots Republicans like YOU right now!

His campaign is barely keeping up with the onslaught from the radical Left. Herschel's team is being forced to use every resource available, _**[so believe me when I say your support will make a difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868201:6k_hsrGeN:m:1:3331421248:E13FBA3AF7C5A7E2E4931D2DD812EA51:r "so believe me when I say your support will make a difference.")**_

When push comes to shove, our America First movement is made up of grassroots supporters like you who are standing at the ready to defend our values.

Thank you,

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 21 day of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863191:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863192:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863193:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863194:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863191:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863191:6fIisrGNB:m:1:3371220873:36A8A9AF0D7F1D5040F0754B856B4CE0:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

"<< RUSH 500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>" "Peter, can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?" When push comes to shove, our America First movement is made up of grassroots supporters like you who are standing at the ready to defend our values. Democrats are mobilizing historic numbers of donors to flood cash into Georgia. And to be frank, if we don 't respond in kind, we will be blown out of the water. This is our final chance to secure a seat for Republicans in the Senate. "Please step up to ensure Raphael Warnock is defeated." body:
Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zal50so1ul8p6550i9de74o5pe13d40mep1u3bjg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb2e3ibct1mmorj4cjgshqr4tlhcdimatpjcuqe1c9h66r3ephim1o68s3h6pjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl69g74db66pib6o37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6o71clim1p30c8iv0)

Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5aarr1vo5kkeq8idrk29gmkl2dcg5eiu3f2kig8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imao74c1h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgdgatse4imehd99agb724b2g4nn9hvuh9pch1d0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imao74c1h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv8fkv26r9hb6sf0bqer3v63guuuftct60v5acro_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imao74c1h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---

name: Pastor Verlene Warnock
subject: my son, Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54575231/378983983/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5080-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDZlMWFjMS0yZDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8OGYpwqGbBd8ipJUn4jWBZusH3KyB2BVTkCDfqQyEA=)Hi, friend.

I’m Verlene Warnock, Raphael’s mom. I’m reaching out on behalf of my son because he’s working so hard right now to give Georgians like me a voice in the Senate and move our country forward. In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to help Raphael win his campaign for reelection – **but first, I hope you'll let me share a little bit about myself and why your support is so important.**

When I was growing up, Jim Crow segregation was at its full power. I spent my summers picking cotton on land I didn’t own, and then went on to become a pastor. My husband – also a pastor – and I taught all 12 of our children the importance of not just dreaming about change and impact, but _making it_. We taught them about the power of community and service – of having a spiritual home and nourishing it like it nourishes you.
**I always knew Raphael was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. Senate.** I can't say I'm surprised: When Raphael was a boy, he would go to the library and come back with a stack of books as tall as he was, dreaming about changing the world.

No matter what hardships we faced as family, he never let his circumstances keep him from thinking and acting big. That's who Raphael is.
With your help last year, he flipped Georgia blue for the first time in years – and I can't express how grateful we were for your support. Now, he's in the Senate fighting to cut costs of prescription drugs, to expand voting rights, and to ensure all children to have access to the same opportunities he had.
**But Raphael's now in a runoff election – and he won't be able to defend his Senate seat and keep up this critical work without grassroots folks like you. Experts are saying the runoff election will be incredibly close, and folks on the other side are spending millions to defeat him.**
I'm so proud of my son. I know how dedicated he is to living a life of service and making positive change for our community. But in a race this close and competitive, he needs supporters like you by his side to win. **[I’m personally asking, friend: Will you chip in what you can for my son to help him win in Georgia and keep on fighting for families like yours and ours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54575232/378983984/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5080-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDZlMWFjMS0yZDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8OGYpwqGbBd8ipJUn4jWBZusH3KyB2BVTkCDfqQyEA=)**
Thank you so much.
– Pastor Verlene Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54575233/378983985/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5080-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDZlMWFjMS0yZDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8OGYpwqGbBd8ipJUn4jWBZusH3KyB2BVTkCDfqQyEA=)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6315%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=IJGiBhD9zjaIN465UqpPwg&sysid=1)
|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82041%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fAGQIiWIMg%2fIawWxHOW1fw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82042%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L08pMb8ILI3GnIgAmHJH%2bA&sysid=1) **

[** Donate $5 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82043%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RZTfj1FNl5KnTEnsoiMcwQ&sysid=1)
[** Donate $15 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82044%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xFpsm%2f4QbcEZaakTdLFboQ&sysid=1)
[** Donate $34 → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82155%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KNV47JhfInK0PeMiQi5yOw&sysid=1)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. subject: Re: Running on empty

body:
We only have 22 days until the critical GA runoff, and we can't let Herschel fight for this seat alone. |
Fellow American - Herschel Walker desperately needs our help.

He's in overtime, running against the number one Senate fundraiser. This thing isn't over yet - **[but it could be if Herschel doesn't get the resources he needs to fully fund his advertising in the next 24 hours.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)**

We saw how much money Hollywood liberals and DC insiders sent to Raphael Warnock in the general election. Now that this is the only Senate race remaining, Warnock is going to get an even bigger bump from the far-Left.

**[Please, Fellow American, help Herschel today with $5 or more in the next 15 minutes.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)** We only have 22 days until the critical GA runoff, and we can't let Herschel fight for this seat alone.

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

* * *

**From:** Herschel Walker
**Date:** Friday, November 11, 2022 at 8:54 AM
**Subject:** Brace yourself
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)

---
Fellow American - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Fellow American.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61117300:WcmyjTDNa:m:1:877327319:0872A2CAE3A05FF5480B63E9E12EA21D:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Help Us Cure Ballots and Count Every Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Thank you for everything you have done to defend our Democracy, our freedoms, our planet, and our values. With your support, our House Democrats and candidates created their own environment with our People Over Politics message. With our wins so far, we made history and turned the so-called conventional wisdom on midterm elections on its head. Your mobilization enabled Democrats to OWN THE GROUND.
But we continue to need your help.

I have an urgent ask: help us finish the job. Our path to 218 Democratic House votes runs through very close races in Arizona, California and Colorado. County elections officials have identified thousands of voters who either did not sign their ballot or whose signature does not match their voting registration record — and who can “cure” their ballot. We have phone banks and canvasses to reach them — and WE NEED YOUR HELP.

Please sign up to reach voters who need to cure their ballots to make sure every vote is counted as cast:
SIGN UP HERE to phone or canvass today: https://www.mobilize.us/grassrootsdemocratslahq/

You Volunteers In Politics are the heart of our Democracy. Thank you for any time you can spend this week.

Onward to a great Democratic victory!

Thank you again and again.

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/D6uJxOgDQUu8umzAjMQV8g2?unsubscribedata=5N0b9fHMJ0NzGuOPev3wbhgmQfxeho4Oz1Lx9b%2FqKphV4gkuX7SyjDClYR%2BT88WKizZ5dfXpFYJnZSQ1XKSFb687a099PpQ%2FImk295EwtGxkUgvfDAIyJ6Ad34sXn2xcQLJ27BPOHSpqCWgSmgh0MvG%2F%2FI8l9TDzTk%2FsnMSe%2Bt%2F8WVtDnkVOP5UXACoGoPYfxdMyIUT2I4xqpSD6LaHUbYbUBHVf8BRHCLF5HGbzI1UY49Buj3vK5b7H8GvEUTyEYfi6qTUNQLIEYN%2F0B0j5OwITvHfHZQrVLo%2FrHzua0zCWg1BaLWsR3uV0wz%2Bp8B2p7BCjM7VLFHt8Kz2aeJ4RnUDrD99yFcfxezWwGPFcu8k6upaFADLgRA81q4MNOL2FrICNMF9FzMDi1V3V7%2FZDXR8w64c5N0sRsmUyt0bf0amRaX%2BCAbtSEmdG24KvwJbU .

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv2hhoui01md9lbc7ar7uml9n8ll7kvbg25jhhf0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjn7fbqio14aj1a04o0rniecln1p3i1mp817jnog_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3eugak5l9hgbvdv6skccvt6kr633bngckhun6po_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5bv3q96m19dv91sg6cb0noqjs0n4f0ptmjg0fv0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjvl9bvns2p7ae7j1g4na91n07epurn9ut14tjc8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zohok18fbbmrhvgj2unan1ju2qsvmhnpobt5d8bo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs)

Lauren Boebert

body:

| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3l7odqd9hs8b297l6krie7hadrhok1u5kg3pno0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im1pr4cdh2bs)

|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdk2to3mmi8aljtr5t1b1p1iidph6127pibadmt8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im1pr4cdh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zik3o42jal9qtemc4v4dt9dj0bj7pajjnnssnpf8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im1pr4cdh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z02mcpmkegbcliv37ccd5at40e76icil9ah78itg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im1pr4cdh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z20cltn1d0jlno272q10nd5j77n1rmj11u29dfp0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmmjs3k3qeodvec48nd3431v7jeva7968pfl4jmo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7u7kuad3j7ghv88k7h39q3ioni31pohcdosm0r0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5imeo74clh2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Raphael Warnock is winning ➡️
body:
| |
---
| | | It's Senator Marsha Blackburn.

I don't reach out to you often, so you _**know**_ this is important.

As I'm sure you know by now, Herschel Walker will face radical Democrat Raphael Warnock in a must-win for Republicans Georgia runoff.

Raphael Warnock has the backing of liberal elites nationwide that are hell-bent on securing the 51st seat for Democrats in the Senate.

They need Warnock to win in order to greenlight their liberal wishlist.

Defunding the police, gutting voter ID, codifying Roe into law, and more will be on the table if Raphael Warnock is victorious.

Herschel Walker is our ONLY chance at stopping the liberal agenda from becoming a reality, and he's counting on the support of grassroots Republicans like YOU right now!

His campaign is barely keeping up with the onslaught from the radical Left. Herschel's team is being forced to use every resource available, _**[so believe me when I say your support will make a difference.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868543:JLpVkrGvN:m:1:3350876382:E491E0C20B3937F4C2F2C4C74064A821:r "so believe me when I say your
support will make a difference.")**_

Due to the severity of this election for Republicans, I've been authorized to unlock 500% matching for the next 45 minutes. This means your support of $25, $35, or even $50 will have 5 TIMES the impact on Herschel Walker's chances in the upcoming runoff.
_**[<< RUSH 500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868543:JLpVkrGvN:m:1:3350876382:E491E0C20B3937F4C2F2C4C74064A821:r "<< RUSH
500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>")**_
_**[Can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868543:JLpVkrGvN:m:1:3350876382:E491E0C20B3937F4C2F2C4C74064A821:r "Peter, can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?")**_

When push comes to shove, our America First movement is made up of grassroots supporters like you who are standing at the ready to defend our values.

_**Democrats are mobilizing historic numbers of donors to flood cash into Georgia. And to be frank, if we don 't respond in kind, we will be blown out of the water. **_

This is our final chance to secure a seat for Republicans in the Senate. _**[Please step up to ensure Raphael Warnock is defeated.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61868543:JLpVkrGvN:m:1:3350876382:E491E0C20B3937F4C2F2C4C74064A821:r "Please step up to ensure Raphael
Warnock is defeated.")**_

Thank you,

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

---

final chance to secure a seat for Republicans in the Senate.")

"<< RUSH 500% MATCHED SUPPORT >>" "Peter, can I count on you to spare a few bucks for Herschel to help his campaign?" When push comes to shove, our America First movement is made up of grassroots supporters like you who are standing at the ready to defend our values. Democrats are mobilizing historic numbers of donors to flood cash into Georgia. And to be frank, if we don 't respond in kind, we will be blown out of the water. This is our final chance to secure a seat for Republicans in the Senate. "Please step up to ensure Raphael Warnock is defeated." name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj26d904m0tcmj325gckmght68hllv46a8q0ain0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im9or4clh2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3stk2qt27sjh9la594ks70vl8u1s6d30enotbjo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im9or4clh2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z439ffl6jss91hvc81do2ej4t0s8rgk9l3q75jlo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im9or4clh2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcg1ajl3737q3mrb9r7l736odg6nlgdptvsd17hg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5im9or4clh2bs)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869690:JDsakrGNS:m:1:3345639852:AF56DA697F3E1A31262AA9D22CBE42C9:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869690:JDsakrGNS:m:1:3345639852:AF56DA697F3E1A31262AA9D22CBE42C9:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869690:JDsakrGNS:m:1:3345639852:AF56DA697F3E1A31262AA9D22CBE42C9:r)**

name: Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo
subject: Thank you for supporting this victory!
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQZlWNhLEAdUDP1EgzPQteoD9Df79SqGBkE3NPaENg3MQajZSCbU4o1wRoeoqWqSzCxOcNEI40q9LYUf2VHmjfkw9VCAaT_lyyXOEbDh30Q2GS9gPqzqWcYbgy6yV_HTfLBuctBR7oS_ogwZbO2NRJRBy5zYU8lw&c=vbp_A2XJlN8pifwmYkKF3CzfMbDslsB1ZNw7rnJkr0rbZqhuoRYahg==&ch=Qc4_c0wET_JH9ym7DuoxvxhRhplgrt-MDcmry2ACi7bn_7-QxwhQkg==)
---
| From the bottom of my heart, Peter, I want to say thank you.
Thank you not just for being one of the major reasons why our campaign was able to overcome millions of dollars being spent against us and secure a tremendous victory.
But also for being a major reason why the great state of Nevada is now in store for a stronger economy, safer streets, better schools, and better leadership.
Because this is a turning point for our state, Peter, and future generations of Nevadans have YOU to thank for the brighter future that's now in store.
To every volunteer, staff member, voter, and supporter like you who helped make this win a reality - I am incredibly grateful. Here's to a stronger, freer, and SAFER Nevada!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pQZlWNhLEAdUDP1EgzPQteoD9Df79SqGBkE3NPaENg3MQajZSCbU4o1wRoeoqWqSzCxOcNEI40q9LYUf2VHmjfkw9VCAaT_lyyXOEbDh30Q2GS9gPqzqWcYbgy6yV_HTfLBuctBR7oS_ogwZbO2NRJRBy5zYU8lw&c=vbp_A2XJlN8pifwmYkKF3CzfMbDslsB1ZNw7rnJkr0rbZqhuoRYahg==&ch=Qc4_c0wET_JH9ym7DuoxvxhRhplgrt-MDcmry2ACi7bn_7-QxwhQkg==)
---
| I am ready to listen to you, work for you, fight for your future, and restore your trust in your Governor.
You deserve nothing less from your leaders... And I'm ready to answer the call.
Thank you again for helping us run a truly impressive campaign here in the state of Nevada - none of it would have been possible without your dedication and support!
For Our State, Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo
---
|
---

clean_body: From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you. | | | | | == | From the bottom of my heart, Peter, I want to say thank you. Thank you not just for being one of the major reasons why our campaign was able to overcome millions of dollars being spent against us and secure a tremendous victory. But also for being a major reason why the great state of Nevada is now in store for a stronger economy, safer streets, better schools, and better leadership. Because this is a turning point for our state, Peter, and future generations of Nevadans have YOU to thank for the brighter future that's now in store. To every volunteer, staff member, voter, and supporter like you who helped make this win a reality - I am incredibly grateful. Here's to a stronger, freer, and SAFER Nevada! | == | I am ready to listen to you, work for you, fight for your future, and restore your trust in your Governor. You deserve nothing less from your leaders... And I'm ready to answer the call. Thank you again for helping us run a truly impressive campaign here in the state of Nevada - none of it would have been possible without your dedication and support! For Our State, Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | | | | | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | == Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmlb7g44enufb0pdmnle42onubmjkqmgilj8opn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm0pb4c1h2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo3k3csedbioloke9o5btr60m6olljrksrjo71b0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm0pb4c1h2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsh307u1ab984h3l07o2350q74qi5rcrf5ij2cqg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm0pb4c1h2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd9e7n0gdlvtu136gpb1l2douhhfl7nuig9ohgf0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm0pb4c1h2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z27vmkbakgoerjjmfc1o7mg019ariun98hrvhrmo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm0pb4c1h2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

Lauren Boebert

name: Kat Cammack
subject: My Priorities for America
body:
High prices, border security, and crime are the most critical issues plaguing Americans.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SzEcQlZQjeqHXyhudGTs-K85kDV_E6dXl0tnCbaX_TvyjULDIYzhrvr-ma04WypDPI_lvef_b5cNfKgh3zsPqqFU5FKZ48RTgRpVEYO8NsKbl-jKzHJHE10VHoIDVI1zHuSZ5sVDxHLOF8Ee6rlkbY4kE2b5gmaHAxrS8AeSQMJAS8UJou_BQN48IZdMyjVRB6kqtG45kJ5LhwtjhzqHtrhyoSmAm0pYv6GsBOFoMjQ=&c=XOAGinwBBfOoy8LNLcq80jLAyBevp6EecKzY6Gimsc2BoZDZMOoHEw==&ch=vsXndPYZ3k7q3kypmL0rxCKRDndbpfClWNMnJEdzE8DPE3FjY4RXZw==)
---
| Friend
High prices, border security, and crime are the most critical issues plaguing Americans. With Republicans gaining momentum across the country, we're on our way to fixing America!
Our country deserves so much better than to face the consequences of an unchecked opioid epidemic, a pro-crime agenda led by the progressive Left, or their inability to control spending and inflation.
They put illegal immigrants and their socialist pet projects ahead of us, but now, it's our turn to hold them accountable!
As a Congresswoman, I've always acted in the interests of the American people that depend on me. I've stood up for your freedoms, worked to keep prices low, and fought to keep our streets safe. It's time to bring us the policies we deserve.
I have huge plans for Florida and America to reverse Biden's crises. We've all suffered for far too long, and it's time that our government serves you instead of itself.
Friend thank you again for being on my team. I will continue updating you as we save our country.
---

clean_body: | | | Peter,Raphael Warnock spent more than $101 million in Georgia's general election and he still couldn’t get above 50% of the vote.That means that Herschel Walker has got a fighting chance at winning this race... he’s going to win BUT we need to make sure we give it all we’ve got.We have twenty two days until the Greorgia runoff which will determine if this Senate is tied or if we Republicans control it. | Our conservative majority depends on Herschel Walker and Herschel’s victory depends on YOU pitching into the Georgia Runoff Fund.You don’t need us to tell you how important this race is... you already know. What we do desperately need is you to PITCH IN right now so that we can get Herschel over the finish line! | | | | | | Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on Herschel’s Election Day outcome.If we can get his funding even, he’ll win. It’s that simple.The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election and they’re going to go MUCH harder now.Let’s make sure Herschel has the resources to FIGHT BACK! | Sincerely,Lavern SpicerPresident, Right Hook PAC | Paid for by Right Hook PAC | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. name: Tim Scott
subject: [RUNOFF ALERT] I’m personally asking for your help in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | **" I hope you'll join me in standing with Herschel Walker and help us win back this seat."
\- Tim Scott**
---
| | | [JOIN ME: STAND WITH HERSCHEL WALKER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870346:JUCE6rGNi:m:1:3317145305:7016067D264F5D1CD0C45E5D04241699:r "Generic Button")
---
This will be the most important email you read today.

**[My friend, Herschel Walker, is fighting for the soul of our nation in the most important Senate race in the country. The stakes couldn't be any higher. So I'm humbly asking if you could pitch in just $25, $35, or even $50 right now to win this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870346:JUCE6rGNi:m:1:3317145305:7016067D264F5D1CD0C45E5D04241699:r "My friend, Herschel Walker, is fighting for the soul of our nation in the most important
Senate race in the country. It’s the LAST seat Republicans need for our Senate majority, and the stakes couldn’t be any higher. So
I’m humbly asking if you could pitch in just $5, $10, or even $50 right now to win this seat.")**
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870346:JUCE6rGNi:m:1:3317145305:7016067D264F5D1CD0C45E5D04241699:r)
---
Herschel is running against the far-left Raphael Warnock, who has voted in lock-step with the likes of Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Chuck Schumer.

If Warnock wins this seat, he will no doubt be the deciding vote when Radical Democrats try to pass their socialist agenda and continue to tank our economy, destroy our borders, and ruin this country.

**Herschel is exactly what this country needs right now. He 's a fighter who loves this country, and he'll do whatever it takes to see America return to greatness.**

But now that this race has entered a runoff, every Democrat in the country has their eyes on it.

They've already spent hundreds of millions to defeat Herschel leading up to Election Day, and they're getting ready to spend even more to help Warnock keep his seat in the runoff.

_The difference between winning and losing could come down to just a couple of votes, and that 's why it's critical we have the support of everyone reading this._

**[If everyone on this list joined me in supporting Herschel, he'll have what it takes to win this toss-up seat. So I'm humbly asking for you to give a small contribution to his campaign today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870346:JUCE6rGNi:m:1:3317145305:7016067D264F5D1CD0C45E5D04241699:r "If everyone on
this list joined me in supporting Herschel, he’ll have what it takes to win this toss-up seat and help Republicans secure their majority in the
Senate. So I’m humbly asking for you to give a small contribution to his campaign today.")**
---
| | | [JOIN TIM: STAND WITH HERSCHEL WALKER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870346:JUCE6rGNi:m:1:3317145305:7016067D264F5D1CD0C45E5D04241699:r "Generic Button")
---
I'm pleading, Peter. Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?

Thank you, and God bless,
Tim Scott
---
|
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zon4tj6qkludf758bgits9mg6skv5mnjsqksf50o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zff7nt1luv1i6ch4vgk51jpnf7g4j64bk8gim6d0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs)
---
|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv6feh6mh463ma141bkt4skfjo4ggeq0pvh7mku0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z070lgmqch937nsn158g8jptiu4jrbgejrkug2m0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvf7u74rgbrbpph3bvjg1pjnc9c6ubk7r91ek3ng_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqt6j9gqo9ljjcucu5kcnvu3pkr7ps35tst487ng_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $10")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbmo8fb16tmeuh8daktnfn9696o70cqgv9emq850_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $25")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1u7nhbibhdfrj9rb7p4ruhj7lpdck3dkvd0gs0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $50")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk6kfcf4a2ut1c6dgris62sdemvc02744155nd4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $100")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh7m3b4kb5rp052bnrj957kj55gvf3nhi52npsq0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $250")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoj13grcqng9ek7s8l1et4rf7ke3c78aq7rui7eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zba3juiq822knrpc418ck9n3dfv8fdf02vabll30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z24q9v1700dov7rqdbgh7atu85hp6eb8ml4ek2go_rp22sh2s8i66or0s5hm8ob2clh2bs)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado
---

name: Presidential Update
subject: BREAKING: President Biden's approval SURGES! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need your response before midnight.
| | |
---
**BREAKING: THREE new polls show President Biden’s approval rate SURGING **_\-- but we still don’t know where you stand!_
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8676%2E9716520%2ETr-s-p)

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8676%2E9716520%2ETr-s-p)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8676%2E9716520%2ETr-s-p)
---

**President Biden’s approval rate is SURGING** according to THREE brand-new polls!

Joe Biden and Democrats SHOCKED experts and the nation with a _historic_ midterm performance -- but **Republicans are _still_ promising to do everything they can to obstruct Biden’s agenda and attack his administration!**

We need to PROVE that Americans stand with President Biden against the GOP's attacks -- _but we have NO RECORD of your approval._ **Our live poll closes at 11:59 PM, so please answer now:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/10971?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-PresidentialUpdate-Biden3PollSurgeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8676%2E9716520%2ETr-s-p)

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uf0jnH2dHBNaQzVA0lkGIxB9GJOiv89Fej_x8g_wOJk=/BQ1mcnB561bKqYvLHZjXZOY_PNFIb_e9wva-Tq4kv4Y=?amount=5&refcode=em_msg_2022.11.14_b1_gs_all) **Friend, I 've been re-elected, and I couldn't have done it without you!**

It's been a long and difficult campaign this year, and thanks to my team of grassroots supporters like you and the amazing voters of Arizona District 4, I've come out on top.

Now, I'm looking forward to the next two years, and friend, we've got a lot to accomplish together! My team and I are rolling up our sleeves and getting right to work on my singular goal: improving the lives of the people I represent.

Thank you so much for supporting me on this journey as part of my people-powered campaign - I hope you'll continue to be on my team in the years to come.

- Greg

Peter,

**The most important Governor race of the 2022 cycle is coming down to the wire.**
The Arizona Governor's race is up in the air, and hundreds of thousands of votes are left out there to be counted. Our War Room of lawyers and data crunchers are working around the clock to make sure Kari Lake wins this election - **but we need your help to keep it running until we win.**

We are officially in overtime and still need to rely on grassroots supporters to get us across the finish line. This is our chance to keep Radical Socialist policies out of AZ. It is our chance to stop the BROKEN Democrat agenda once and for all.

| | | Peter,

**Lauren Boebert is in a HUGE fight in her too-close-to-call election.**

Democrats are pouring money into Aspen Adam Frisch's coffers, even though he is losing to Lauren with 1% of the vote left to be counted.

Lauren recorded [a personal video to all patriots across the country](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870383:JGdpprGND:m:1:3361486117:09D7A3E56F577AD8C9EB2B4FBFFD48BA:r) explaining how vital it is that we rally together during this moment.

| Lauren is a true fighter and we are confident she will win. However, Lauren's lead is so razor-thin, she is currently within the threshold for an automatic recount in a Democrat-controlled state.

We must make sure the vote counting process is fair and transparent.

So, [please watch Lauren's short video and make an online contribution of ANY amount to her recount fund.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870383:JGdpprGND:m:1:3361486117:09D7A3E56F577AD8C9EB2B4FBFFD48BA:r) **Democrats have spent MILLIONS trying to sway this election**, and we need to be ready to counter their attacks!

Thank you and God Bless,

**Team Lauren**
Lauren Boebert for Congress

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869745:6NrlprGEN:m:1:3360412034:30B73421F3672F840D78F3614D897D61:r)**

Herschel Walker

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker’s biggest (campaign) problem is that he doesn’t have more popular Republicans carrying conservative voters to the polls for him. If we can try to match the money Mitch McConnell is spending on this runoff, we have a chance at re-electing Raphael Warnock.
body:
He could be in big trouble
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74116917-cc99-498f-8ee1-94a1477a1ba9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[HERSCHEL WALKER HAS A SERIOUS PROBLEM](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00b91a4d-bb00-4c72-ad41-2236c0b45074/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_No, as sick as it is, we're not talking about the multiple womens' lives he's threatened--including holding a gun to his ex-wife's head and telling her he'd "blow her brains out." Nor are we referencing Walker's serial dishonesty, from denying he took two women to get abortions (he did, and still believes in a ban, no exceptions) to claiming he served in the miliary (nope), police (nope), FBI (nope) and graduated from the U. of Georgia in the top 1% (he didn't graduate). _** **_These are only some of Walker's many lies. The scary thing is there are so many, it makes me wonder if he actually believes them--if he even understands reality._** _**The problem we refer to is Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp won't be on the ballot this time helping turning out voters who only voted for Walker when they thought it meant a**** Senate majority. ****Kemp received an astonishing 210,000 more votes than Walker, betraying the weakness of Walker's candidacy.**_
---
|
---

So can you join Blue Amp Action in rushing $5, $10 or $25 to Raphael Warnock right now for the three weeks left in this runoff?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0b46d16-dae3-4c8d-b37f-c64a114bbbcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks for standing up yet again, Blue Amp Action community.**

Cliff

body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Fellow American,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

clean_body: The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. | Fellow American, If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing. Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th. I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess. Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate. The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help. Together, we can win this race! Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
We have to be prepared for anything here in Arizona.

| I know, Peter—it’s been a long couple of days!

As of right now, my race for Arizona governor is still too close to call. But here’s the thing:

In 2020, we stood firm to protect our democracy when conspiracy theorists claimed the election was stolen.

In 2021, we stood firm against the sham audits that undermined the integrity of our elections.

In 2022, we will stand firm again until every single ballot has been counted.

[_**My team and I are hard at work preparing for any scenario, and we’re focused on making sure we’ve got the resources to keep our operations running strong as we work to ensure every vote from every county is counted. clean_body: We have to be prepared for anything here in Arizona. | I know, Peter—it’s been a long couple of days! As of right now, my race for Arizona governor is still too close to call. But here’s the thing: In 2020, we stood firm to protect our democracy when conspiracy theorists claimed the election was stolen. In 2021, we stood firm against the sham audits that undermined the integrity of our elections. In 2022, we will stand firm again until every single ballot has been counted. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We have to be prepared for anything here in Arizona — and anything you can pitch in right now goes a long way in supporting our on-the-ground efforts to defend democracy. Fellow American,

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

body:
We have to make sure my friend Raphael Warnock wins
#

Team —
I'm so grateful that Arizona has elected me to a full term in the Senate.
But this email isn't about me. We have to make sure my friend Raphael Warnock wins his runoff campaign in Georgia.
We both beat the odds to win in 2020, and I've seen how hard he works over these last two years. He fights for the people of Georgia every day and he's exactly the kind of leader we need. Someone who doesn't seek to lead for themselves, but to serve the people who sent him there.
So, I've got to ask:
[**Can you split a donation between Senator Warnock's campaign and mine?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221114-1-7&t=1&akid=4773%2E6688874%2Ex5_NeU)
