name: Shane
subject: loud and clear
body:
we have a pretty clear view of our historic victory on Tuesday
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54609898/379055895/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDI0N2ExZS03MDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7BAKtb99p1g3FMItfdUBGHktfB9S6H-r04btJFnnk4=&emci=31641361-4664-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=30247a1e-7064-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek: On Tuesday, the people of PA-06 spoke loud and clear. They went to the ballot box in record numbers to vote their values and for their future and reelected Chrissy, along with terrific leaders up and down the ballot.

While there are still a few thousand votes left to count, we have a pretty clear view of our historic victory on Tuesday. **So, let's look at the numbers more closely:**
* **58.2% : That's the percentage of the vote Chrissy has won so far, and it will likely increase slightly before the results are certified. That is even more than the share of the 2020 vote she earned!**

* **188,280 : That's how many people voted for Chrissy so far (we expect this number to increase also). It’s made up of 150,796 voters from Chester and 37,484 from Berks.**

* **~55% of eligible voters voted! : Our democracy is strongest when people are engaged, and this is an exceptionally strong number. In 2018, a historically high turnout midterm, 50% of eligible voters voted nationwide. Our district outperformed that this cycle by 5%. Still, we have work to do to bring it closer to 100%.**

I'm honored and grateful to have worked for Chrissy and with our amazing volunteers, and everyone who donated, put up a sign, knocked on doors, talked to a friend, or cast a vote. This work wouldn't have been possible without your support. So thank you!

Chrissy's work in Congress continues, and we hope you'll stay by her side as we continue to fight for working families.
More soon,

Shane
Chrissy Houlahan for Congress, Campaign Manager

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9008755801ee4341956734f175fb6b1a&_e=40zR7gKvOxmTwFrh7CAdg996wOAA-Y1AU_FGtGGlPS4qcaVtCXdfIhFUHXXgkCQCLP6dXz-cboHM9cB-Gr8JxOOD42XpLZV4iQscaHn36a9OKgaFMQffI-fxVdlKpizdCzR99iuqg375uwopunXCQ6a1el-xURGqOrTs_mK5ILabwttAw4xaYsYKv6QezHAqKqXc7LH8ATZtx7oc6Pu0d9ZdpCRi2UGX3fnrgq-WVyZtEXp4teJY12z8YccFhvaGZhKYurSLwIgYeJsIDABduPGIv2XQka_46KnPZI03Rt2Y_LxirAt4zow5AezIyPYhn9f2TDvPh2gBcuSCgq3jO-3m5H5nE4Ot4B3ib5KFVNmKacYE5w4kjlm6e3Up4oKRa1WptRCjve0kvPbey8fJUHH5Vpa3EZCnOVWOHY7t--g%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29.**

subject: Georgia outcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863224:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863225:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863226:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863223:JRH1rrGNX:m:1:3372944669:ED67E77668076FEBE30B34491310317A:r)

Peter,
---
Our fight to take back our country is far from over.
---
With the fate of Georgia's must-win Senate seat still hanging in the balance, my good friend Herschel Walker needs our support now more than ever.

**That 's why I'm personally sending my campaign team down to GA to give Herschel the final push he needs to WIN his runoff election.**

__But we can 't afford to send our team empty-handed.__
---
I'm counting on my top supporters like YOU - who already delivered an incredible victory here in Texas - to help me provide Herschel with both the team and resources he needs to **FLIP** this Senate seat.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869784:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869784:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869783:J06irrGyN:m:1:3359512271:610B0E8CB67288F7AF18D89247712203:r)

| | | |

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irga9cXNvG7AR8KeIBJnTL_znhj5gnBCVRSPdDa3dRnVHxT6ETCx6rmB-QE-pBjYoL1zz-H_NUmRLz6__kkqbMd2GJIKWwzUMEMchPRGLvLGKzc9_hBAEeW14EmQ33FZE1gJ2aDgqjdps_nk13e9OT02di1ufudONBfjvpFr_OrGPskEicoL9hYztbFm-9-r1v3p6uq8mihet0O5ZcJUAQ==&c=QRyMblwnIRNYkAzZzcFan6iukCiErgb01TL9gkSKJ23Daw1oBh5A2g==&ch=UWfdwLcTQ2v-1ciJR4cAg8e4FYhYvkxAtXgEXB1OReGajGrp9tSqKg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Last week's double-digit victory in the great state of Florida wasn't brought to you by any Corporate PAC, Swamp lobbyist, or shameless special interest group.
Unlike the Establishment Dems and sell-out RINOs... I don't take their dirty money!
My fight to put America and her people first in the halls of Congress is powered by one thing and one thing only - grassroots patriots like YOU, Peter.
Because it's YOU I work for... NOT the Swamp!!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irga9cXNvG7AR8KeIBJnTL_znhj5gnBCVRSPdDa3dRnVHxT6ETCx6rmB-QE-pBjYoL1zz-H_NUmRLz6__kkqbMd2GJIKWwzUMEMchPRGLvLGKzc9_hBAEeW14EmQ33FZE1gJ2aDgqjdps_nk13e9OT02di1ufudONBfjvpFr_OrGPskEicoL9hYztbFm-9-r1v3p6uq8mihet0O5ZcJUAQ==&c=QRyMblwnIRNYkAzZzcFan6iukCiErgb01TL9gkSKJ23Daw1oBh5A2g==&ch=UWfdwLcTQ2v-1ciJR4cAg8e4FYhYvkxAtXgEXB1OReGajGrp9tSqKg==)
---
| Putting America First means making the American People your one and only special interest group and swearing off dark money from woke corporations and their lobbyists.
That's what I've done and will continue to do in the upcoming Congress, Peter...
And since I won't be taking a single red cent from the corrupt forces in the Swamp that gladly ship our jobs to China, turn our Southern Border into a turnstile, and let Big Tech and Big Pharma run amok...
[I'd be honored if you sponsored my fight instead by checking the box at this link and signing up for recurring donations to keep the operation running here at Team Gaetz.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irga9cXNvG7AR8KeIBJnTL_znhj5gnBCVRSPdDa3dRnVHxT6ETCx6rmB-QE-pBjYoL1zz-H_NUmRLz6__kkqbMd2GJIKWwzUMEMchPRGLvLGKzc9_hBAEeW14EmQ33FZE1gJ2aDgqjdps_nk13e9OT02di1ufudONBfjvpFr_OrGPskEicoL9hYztbFm-9-r1v3p6uq8mihet0O5ZcJUAQ==&c=QRyMblwnIRNYkAzZzcFan6iukCiErgb01TL9gkSKJ23Daw1oBh5A2g==&ch=UWfdwLcTQ2v-1ciJR4cAg8e4FYhYvkxAtXgEXB1OReGajGrp9tSqKg==)
Joining our select group of monthly supporters ensures I never have to take a dime from the lobbyists and corporate PACs who make what should be a noble profession into something that more resembles the oldest profession...
So if you believe your leaders should serve the people - not the Washington powers that be - please invest in that vision today and become an America First monthly supporter!
---
| | [JOIN THE TEAM!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irga9cXNvG7AR8KeIBJnTL_znhj5gnBCVRSPdDa3dRnVHxT6ETCx6rmB-QE-pBjYoL1zz-H_NUmRLz6__kkqbMd2GJIKWwzUMEMchPRGLvLGKzc9_hBAEeW14EmQ33FZE1gJ2aDgqjdps_nk13e9OT02di1ufudONBfjvpFr_OrGPskEicoL9hYztbFm-9-r1v3p6uq8mihet0O5ZcJUAQ==&c=QRyMblwnIRNYkAzZzcFan6iukCiErgb01TL9gkSKJ23Daw1oBh5A2g==&ch=UWfdwLcTQ2v-1ciJR4cAg8e4FYhYvkxAtXgEXB1OReGajGrp9tSqKg==)

| Matt Gaetz

body:
It’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
| | |
---
Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking: ****[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Letitia James to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54610232/379056779/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk915-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWUwYmMzYi03MTY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=77Uz2Zrwopra8jdJoMgOTusMeS3Usd-VudmFXvqMW18=)**
That's why GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going ****_all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**** **
**[Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or more now between me and Letitia so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54610233/379056780/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk915-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWUwYmMzYi03MTY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=77Uz2Zrwopra8jdJoMgOTusMeS3Usd-VudmFXvqMW18=)**

name: Aruna Miller
subject: I want to thank you for everything
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54584975/379021372/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_na_20221114aruna_am_od30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTg5NjEzNC00NzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aG1f9gunHnscfFJpn0lhvbIhRHYuOSi-DGwPK_GCLqs=)
---
Team, Before I ask you for anything, I want to thank you for everything. Thank you for your hard work, your stories, and your dreams which have given life to our movement. I am humbled and honored to be your Lieutenant Governor-Elect. **Last Tuesday, you showed the nation what a small but mighty state can do when democracy is on the ballot. You chose unity over division, expanding rights over restricting rights, hope over fear. You chose Wes and me to be your next Governor and Lieutenant Governor.** Ever since I came to this country in 1972, I’ve never stopped being excited for the promise of America. I will never stop fighting to make sure that promise is available to everyone. And this promise begins with a commitment to deliver a Maryland where we Leave No One Behind. From Western Maryland to Southern Maryland, Charm City to Pocomoke City to Ocean City, Gorgeous Prince George’s to Mountain Maryland. Our Maryland is one where people feel safe in their communities and in their skin, where we show the nation that our rights are not up for grabs. The moral to this story is, NEVER EVER underestimate the underdogs. And guess what? We’ll always look out for the underdogs. _We see you. We hear you. We believe in you. And Wes and I are going to fight for you._ Our work starts now. **I am honored and proud to serve as chair of our historic transition team.** We look forward to working in partnership with leaders across Maryland to uplift Wes’ and my commitment to leave no one behind. It is our commitment to make this transition the most inclusive and transparent transition Maryland has ever seen, and we invite you to join us to share your ideas. [**Marylanders, please visit http://mooremillermd.com to share your ideas with us and learn more about our transition work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54584976/379021373/-605269599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTg5NjEzNC00NzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aG1f9gunHnscfFJpn0lhvbIhRHYuOSi-DGwPK_GCLqs=&emci=0be6fe2c-4764-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=1a896134-4764-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=24635485) We’re just getting started! Thank you again, Aruna [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54584977/379021374/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_na_20221114aruna_am_od30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTg5NjEzNC00NzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aG1f9gunHnscfFJpn0lhvbIhRHYuOSi-DGwPK_GCLqs=) | | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland.

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

This seat is very important, and we must do everything we can to secure the vote and turn out the votes! subject: this is amazing news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:

Friend, the results from the general election showed me narrowly leading my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker.
But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. **That's why I'm urgently asking:** [Will you give $5 or more before midnight to win in Georgia and keep this Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54584953/379021292/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5047-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJiNWFlNy00NjY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpfKO8hO-g65zRKeFipqgCZQ05LO7B4ZQUSiYnAhkP4=)
Election experts just confirmed what we've known for months: Our race will be decided by a razor-thin margin. That's why GOP donors are rushing our race with over $37 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching attack ads during this critical stretch.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. ****We've set a $50,000 midnight fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.**

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0faa5938b7c4ff7b95e95266528f382&_e=If1iJ0LJ80Y99Mro70KeWLgLzzQtMZBvCk2Bt79egO_5sRQM0u2f8EBaMmThLLqwkmN4jKYH4VZjsXkUXOyZImbd-MN0Vhhq5CAY9O2ZVfMHVYTlLv2lzHEsLIqz5MzrGWo5NFzP8JrEHg5laAgzl9Tf5TytatRhBpZg_MCyx-XLz5eS5szbI5q-b046B1xsS72a57BDlkmJXOCm4PfSvWUCL9fgaLslUyh9xQDT4UwH0iKVZQqN85nMnnqmdAMrBojCs2iWYiDI7yCmUlW9w1yR-bLhTH-g2cosSvw8RMMks05MpRuY66Ew0aaFG0NLZrDwjw3DgmeNrcfcYRUhQbSwWvGDoXooQFgSH4Ko0938iYKyS1DpZSiezUzlde_88bbilwd3FAgLyXKRZFqCyoGycg5UTehhLTRjs0fdZHU%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0faa5938b7c4ff7b95e95266528f382&_e=If1iJ0LJ80Y99Mro70KeWLgLzzQtMZBvCk2Bt79egO_5sRQM0u2f8EBaMmThLLqwkmN4jKYH4VZjsXkUXOyZImbd-MN0Vhhq5CAY9O2ZVfMHVYTlLv2lzHEsLIqz5MzrGWo5NFzP8JrEHg5laAgzl9Tf5TytatRhBpZg_MCyx-XLz5eS5szbI5q-b046B1xsS72a57BDlkmJXOCm4PfSvS2A87f4hROCKl2YootDYqKBauFPnZ1r6OJmg9J5XCIDPbytYBxIlU1Hdsovycz4XFecoIJNTq1IRAnt2SZ0UY1VFiHTFtLREK52CwovIPVIBXvDQ6oIiNm9j1vyGB-EhJbzk4ia7yUA3V4vkNW9l5VYnEmWW1HwitpYVU06uolFEiorCP0AvYry0Sui3kOSHhIaUufZwl6w54uJruw2AHk%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JD Vance
subject: All eyes are on the Georgia run-off.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc

name: Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
With less than 30 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
#
**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 30 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, friends: Will you chip in $5 now to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-warnock-split**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.lBAW6c&refcode=em221114-1-MA&t=1&akid=2271%2E357359%2E0bcIaw)
Thank you for pitching in, friends. I truly appreciate your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2271%2E357359%2E0bcIaw). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2271%2E357359%2E0bcIaw). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=2271_357359_0bcIaw&akid=2271%2E357359%2E0bcIaw) today to help us make history.

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20Bradley?=
subject: The big announcement of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0eb88ad7dd&e=fdefed58de)
---
PeterWell, I've got huge news. In 2018, I ran for Senate in California against one of the most ineffective members of the US Senate - Dianne Feinstein.In that primary, I got 556,252 votes - the most of any Republican in the race by far. As you know, however, California has a jungle primary system where only the top two vote-getters advance to the general election.Democrats stuck in a far-left progressive who got into second place and we did NOT have a general election contest.**Well, I’ve decided that in 2024 I am running once again to rematch against Dianne Feinstein - and this time, with the political winds in California having changed, I’m going to get to the general and defeat her.**
| [SUPPORT JAMES BRADLEY, LET’S BEAT DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=67351fcc54&e=fdefed58de)
---
Now, let’s discuss the data that informs this decision so that we can be upfront with each other.
1. Dianne Feinstein will be 91 years old at the time of the 2024 election but has still committed to running for the seat. That means at the end of her six-year term, she would be 97 years old. Now, I respect good genes as much as the next person, but no one should be deciding our laws in the US Senate at 97 years old.
2. The progressives in our state hate Dianne Feinstein. They think she is far too “conservative” despite having a 100% voting record with Joe Biden. The fight to replace her is going to be crowded and thanks to a very divided jungle primary, a well-funded Republican can get through and win.

So, as a Constitutional conservative who is common-sense and one of the leaders of the election integrity movement in California, I know that I can win this race.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2d3e62cff4&e=fdefed58de)
**Voters know me and I have the name recognition, but now I need the financial backing.** I’m starting EARLY so that by the time people begin to truly pay attention to this race we can be way ahead in fundraising and begin to unify the ticket.It works. Look at Lee Zelda. There was not a fierce primary. New Yorkers all unified around him and he pulled that state to heights no one expected. Frankly, he’s responsible for getting us the House. Now, Lee didn’t win... but we know why that * **truly** * was. We can do it, but we need to have a financial war chest that rivals Dianne’s.And we need to begin to learn how to compete with the Democrats with this ballot harvesting operation. We can’t continue to be “too good” for it. We have to focus on winning.
| [DONATE $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3af9955d34&e=fdefed58de)
---

clean_body: | | | PeterWell, I've got huge news. In 2018, I ran for Senate in California against one of the most ineffective members of the US Senate - Dianne Feinstein.In that primary, I got 556,252 votes - the most of any Republican in the race by far. As you know, however, California has a jungle primary system where only the top two vote-getters advance to the general election.Democrats stuck in a far-left progressive who got into second place and we did NOT have a general election contest.Well, I’ve decided that in 2024 I am running once again to rematch against Dianne Feinstein - and this time, with the political winds in California having changed, I’m going to get to the general and defeat her. | Now, let’s discuss the data that informs this decision so that we can be upfront with each other. 1. Dianne Feinstein will be 91 years old at the time of the 2024 election but has still committed to running for the seat. That means at the end of her six-year term, she would be 97 years old. Now, I respect good genes as much as the next person, but no one should be deciding our laws in the US Senate at 97 years old. 2. The progressives in our state hate Dianne Feinstein. They think she is far too “conservative” despite having a 100% voting record with Joe Biden. The fight to replace her is going to be crowded and thanks to a very divided jungle primary, a well-funded Republican can get through and win. So, as a Constitutional conservative who is common-sense and one of the leaders of the election integrity movement in California, I know that I can win this race. Voters know me and I have the name recognition, but now I need the financial backing. I’m starting EARLY so that by the time people begin to truly pay attention to this race we can be way ahead in fundraising and begin to unify the ticket.It works. Look at Lee Zelda. There was not a fierce primary. New Yorkers all unified around him and he pulled that state to heights no one expected. Frankly, he’s responsible for getting us the House. Now, Lee didn’t win... but we know why that truly was. We can do it, but we need to have a financial war chest that rivals Dianne’s.And we need to begin to learn how to compete with the Democrats with this ballot harvesting operation. We can’t continue to be “too good” for it. We have to focus on winning. | | | | | | | My name is James P. Bradley a decorated veteran, business owner and a father fighting for our nation.I am a fighter that will never give up on saving our great state and our children's future. P. | | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fe8337df441462aaa9d367623057809&_e=5f5NwRqHV_sM17PrgYNr5w_QFbQ5PmdSk-WwhSsIMnZ-W2gGcdGt-WAPNfphccODf_yLMmVPJwcRVrEA1cQZC2sYY26CCuxadHXW8j0maoFk4P3yrIbX4rElVTuwbAtdZvIsET_f7Vj_Ipq0HqVrPo23_DxQjEGa841kfbtTlPngXwhXI0aiNupxb3-RNlNY5vS-IYHbGqBY4y6jOLvycLJsAVWd45ZBknBOxgSrtLlJLu4EZWbCN0xhmIltVWEgoDtf_PbbhgWeVblH9KbD-W-jAd59dMdp0JVPa66YfIA%3D)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fe8337df441462aaa9d367623057809&_e=5f5NwRqHV_sM17PrgYNr5w_QFbQ5PmdSk-WwhSsIMnZ-W2gGcdGt-WAPNfphccODf_yLMmVPJwcRVrEA1cQZC2sYY26CCuxadHXW8j0maoFk4P3yrIbX4rElVTuwbAtdZvIsET_f7Vj_Ipq0HqVrPlMY9lvnI87osr14FM-OYQIIP8iUWNPFOBE2PPmQSay3u2_foE0W7ZQc-zdeRh_hOyejigkPs715H5h_G0yTlrJPa7o1HXB1QR-Zf8V90Q2M8wTHIeTE36qsqaoJqOFESzdSoxY-15xryaIrIkB8F60%3D) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fe8337df441462aaa9d367623057809&_e=5f5NwRqHV_sM17PrgYNr5w_QFbQ5PmdSk-WwhSsIMnZ-W2gGcdGt-WAPNfphccODf_yLMmVPJwcRVrEA1cQZC2sYY26CCuxadHXW8j0maoFk4P3yrIbX4rElVTuwbAtdZvIsET_f7Vj_Ipq0HqVrPvGy3DwUbaQ15z3n3D6OsTNq5dtr0T0QSfsRzjtPVLmw4p60YRPlOm0Ps37sCAYen5rBxENLuMAF4lgdAcGrGn4q-43a6O67H0bNAObhLTVlnkVcdalk0vXnSwXHoAWXPmKUpL6HmAUeBSc6o8snDvU%3D). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

body:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869607:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869607:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869606:JNkw1rGNx:m:1:3331421248:F247FD1090EA8BA715019379C5C1462D:r)

body:
Adam Frisch needs our help. |
#
---
Peter, Election Day has already passed us by, but this election is not yet settled. Adam Frisch is running in Colorado’s 3rd congressional district to defeat Lauren Boebert, a far-right MAGA Republican who has trafficked in QAnon-conspiracy theories, egged on January 6th insurrectionists, and spread misinformation about COVID vaccines. **But at the moment, his race is too close to call, and he needs our help.** Colorado votes almost entirely by mail, so voters have the opportunity to “cure” their ballot to correct any mistakes and ensure that their vote is properly counted. Right now, Adam Frisch’s campaign is working hard to ensure that every voter who needs to cure their ballot has the information they need to make their vote count. But Adam’s district is _huge_ — spanning 27 counties and more than 50,000 square miles. **So, will you chip in a donation to Adam’s campaign so they can help as many voters as possible cure their ballots before Wednesday’s deadline? | | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94c2c519b19b41059d723a9c4f978b41&_e=fVlZs1rBUmU0yBm1Z1TX6zXL4FaVf4NnD8QgKIz1EFOuXRMvWg906szpMArvLa2jHYU_TU5y44O6PVXdk8AvmaCskgXItYqneAda-OIfoGbJfNIEx_FvwqZnPTuFa9xSm5w9YfRNk-Cvg80CEvYNA1Cf4L6mLVTwTeuicu5AiBrnFJROpd41_5WtTUp_DmubZee7wJsXsrfzY0oEBSXj8ofbj1NVP_PUq2mI5brNvRKoXDSADO7q3bhWEpXDfeIZalYs97TRybcBgf5SdttIZSjzb6u4Z6BBjLW_Le0CqAE%3D)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94c2c519b19b41059d723a9c4f978b41&_e=fVlZs1rBUmU0yBm1Z1TX6zXL4FaVf4NnD8QgKIz1EFOuXRMvWg906szpMArvLa2jHYU_TU5y44O6PVXdk8AvmaCskgXItYqneAda-OIfoGbJfNIEx_FvwqZnPTuFa9xSm5w9YfRNk-Cvg80CEvYNA2Ph8REQmX8o_69RTqdQQORdXc4cMVOGvNsPH7zJ_n-gAUUtP9wJsusk1YyjvW9cfWAtZd0e-brt4hBDLdJ856EoTOxnEbi6JLa3J-fp3nGFJGFhrUwEohz4bt2Jbumbaei2wxRYPu3vjvI9yUNDjls%3D) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94c2c519b19b41059d723a9c4f978b41&_e=fVlZs1rBUmU0yBm1Z1TX6zXL4FaVf4NnD8QgKIz1EFOuXRMvWg906szpMArvLa2jHYU_TU5y44O6PVXdk8AvmaCskgXItYqneAda-OIfoGbJfNIEx_FvwqZnPTuFa9xSm5w9YfRNk-Cvg80CEvYNA8Ik1NzUudcuzuvGGk7QFGdBODgQEnQM8uXZ9EhzZ58phYgbp-6UwFoYGjduZEh4gRFEKBwQSni7efP8MoT4acHkTk4SqtZ4saLLV46G77Z0E4ne4B1XI39fkDVx6Yb0M8ix6DG25EVULh79_OKgaGo%3D). clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend -- My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT. The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies. We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead. Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need. Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. | "URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>" | Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District RED is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN. Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and . We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need to do so. We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome. I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. clean_body: We knew the liberal mega-donors would help Senator Warnock and the Democrat Super PACs refill their coffers, but we didn't think it would happen THIS | 🚨 BREAKING GA RUNOFF NEWS 🚨 Fellow American, I have some disturbing news. The Democrats just launched a massive $6.5 million advertising blitz for the runoff! We knew the liberal mega-donors would help Senator Warnock and the Democrat Super PACs refill their coffers, but we didn't think it would happen THIS quickly. We only have 22 days until the runoff election, so we need your help to get our ads on the air IMMEDIATELY! I am counting on you, Fellow American. Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: I am so proud of what we accomplished here, and I hope you are, too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54595013/379033707/1901966182?refcode=fl_email_na_20221114thankyou_ae_120da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzg4ZTk1ZC01NDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2Ccxv8228kZ-96ZBtH0iy4PkszSt8esjw80jyZDL_E=)
---
Friends — While we didn't get the results we were hoping for, it has been an honor to have received so much support from the people of Pennsylvania’s 1st District. I am so proud of what we accomplished here, and I hope you are, too. **Without taking a dime of corporate PAC money or outside institutional support, we turned out more midterm voters than ever before in PA-01.** None of that would have been possible without supporters like you fighting for a brighter future. This was truly a grassroots movement from the ground up. You took a chance on me, and I will forever be grateful for the time, money, energy, and dedication you put into this campaign. Against all odds, Pennsylvanians showed up in full force and successfully flipped a key Senate seat blue, elected pro-choice champion Josh Shapiro for governor, and rejected GOP extremism at the ballot. Many PA State House seats within PA-01 flipped blue for the first time in years, which is an amazing accomplishment. **Our work to build a Commonwealth for all does not end here.** We must continue to hold our lawmakers accountable to the people and fight like hell for the place we call home. After a short break to (finally!) clean my house and spend some time with the cutest little niece in the world, I will be back to help keep Bucks and MontCo blue in 2023. Thank you for everything. Ashley Ehasz |

clean_body: | = Friends — While we didn't get the results we were hoping for, it has been an honor to have received so much support from the people of Pennsylvania’s 1st District. I am so proud of what we accomplished here, and I hope you are, too. Without taking a dime of corporate PAC money or outside institutional support, we turned out more midterm voters than ever before in PA-01. None of that would have been possible without supporters like you fighting for a brighter future. This was truly a grassroots movement from the ground up. You took a chance on me, and I will forever be grateful for the time, money, energy, and dedication you put into this campaign. Against all odds, Pennsylvanians showed up in full force and successfully flipped a key Senate seat blue, elected pro-choice champion Josh Shapiro for governor, and rejected GOP extremism at the ballot. Many PA State House seats within PA-01 flipped blue for the first time in years, which is an amazing accomplishment. Our work to build a Commonwealth for all does not end here. We must continue to hold our lawmakers accountable to the people and fight like hell for the place we call home. After a short break to (finally!) clean my house and spend some time with the cutest little niece in the world, I will be back to help keep Bucks and MontCo blue in 2023. Thank you for everything. Ashley Ehasz | | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Us vs. them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

From the beginning, we’ve been laser-focused on electing new kinds of
leaders. Diverse, committed leaders who would put people ahead of profits,
and bold policies ahead of career politics.

That’s why every Justice Democrat we elect makes a difference, like:

🎉 Summer Lee: a community organizer from Pittsburgh who became the first
Black woman to represent Southwestern Pennsylvania in the state
legislature

🎉 Greg Casar: a labor organizer and son of Mexican immigrants who
successfully fought for city-wide progressive policies in Austin

🎉 AOC: a working-class bartender in Queens who was supporting her family
while paying off student debt

🎉 Cori Bush: an ordained pastor, registered nurse, and frontline activist
who was raising 2 kids as a single mother in St. Louis

🎉 Jamaal Bowman: a public middle-school principal who was advocating for
trauma-informed education for young people across New York state

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120574?refcode=em20221114-26071&t=1001&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF ]In just 4 years, we’ve helped elect progressives over and over who
challenge politics as usual. It’s clear the work is worth it, but it takes
serious time and resources — can you chip in so we can maintain our
winning momentum?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120574?refcode=em20221114-26071&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF ]Contribute

Right now, almost half of all members of Congress are millionaires. Over
three quarters, or 77%, of all members of Congress are white. 473 members
of Congress accept donations from corporate PACs.

That’s why we’re proud to send the entire Squad AND Greg and Summer to
Congress. We believe that our elected officials should actually understand
and relate to the communities they represent — and prioritize regular,
working people over corporate interests.

For that reason, we challenge the status quo in politics. That scares the
Democratic establishment, and it shows. It shows in their efforts to cling
on to the past and support entrenched incumbents instead of embracing the
change the Democratic Party needs.

But cycle after cycle, we keep winning — because ours is the way forward.
Our candidates are fierce, caring, determined, and loyal to the people,
not the money. That’s why our resources can make or break their races.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120574?refcode=em20221114-26071&t=1021&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF ]We rely on grassroots fundraising, which means your donation always
has and always will make a real difference for our work. So
Peter — will
you invest in our work as we support our newest Justice Democrats?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221114-26071-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26071_1203867_-QOirF&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26071%2E1203867%2E-QOirF

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Peter,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Center=20for=20Renewing=20America?=
subject: REGISTER: What Should the GOP do now? (only a few spots left)
body:
Breakfast and lunch will be provided. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-9537307?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Does the Right have a real plan for what to do in the new Congress?

What can conservatives do to rebalance national power while halting the Left’s abuses, to punish their wrongdoing, and to stop what looks more and more like the beginning of a uniparty tyranny?

We will aim to answer these questions and more at [an event we’re co-hosting](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=693314abe3&e=17913c7d6d) with The Claremont Institute for the American Way of Life, The Conservative Partnership Institute, Hillsdale College, and the American Conservative at the Kirby Center in Washington, D.C. this Wednesday, November 16th.

(_only a few spots left, secure your attendance by registering below_)

**EVENT** : [What should the GOP do now?](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=09e1a6f670&e=17913c7d6d) (full agenda below)

**TIME** : Wednesday, November 16th, 9:00am - 2:00pm. Doors open at 8:30am

**LOCATION** : Hillsdale College, Kirby Center 227 Massachusetts Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002
---
|
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=085b9e25bf&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| **Full Agenda**

**8:30 am— Registration Begins**

**9:00-9:10 am— Introduction**
* Matthew Mehan, Director of Academic Programs for Hillsdale D.C.
* Arthur Milikh, Executive Director, The Claremont Institute’s Center for the American Way of Life

**9:10-9:40 am— The Deep State and a New Church Committee**
* U.S. Representative Dan Bishop (R-NC)
* Julie Kelly, Senior Editor, American Greatness
* Robert Delahunty, Washington Fellow, Claremont Institute

**9:45-10:30 am— How Should We Conduct Oversight Over the Regime? **
* Jim Jordan, Ranking Member of the House Judiciary Committee (R-OH)
* Russ Vought, President, The Center for Renewing America

**10:30-11:15 am— The Administrative State and Civil Service Reform **
* U.S. Representative Chip Roy (R-TX)
* Theo Wold, Washington Fellow, Claremont Institute
* Jeff Clark, Director of Litigation, The Center for Renewing America

**11:30 am-12:15 pm— Defunding the Left’s Federal Support **
* U.S. Representative Bob Good (R-VA)
* Amy Wax, Professor, University of Pennsylvania School of Law
* Arthur Milikh, Executive Director, The Claremont Institute's Center for the American Way of Life

**12:20-12:50 pm— Overseeing and Investigating the Regime **
* U.S. Representative Jim Banks (R-IN), Candidate for House Republican Whip

**1:00-2:00 pm— Lunch Served: The Lawless Regime**
* Rachel Bovard (introduction), Senior Director of Policy, Conservative Policy Institute, Janice Rogers Brown, retired Judge of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit

---
|
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=400ff0f916&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
We hope to see you on Wednesday!

Sincerely,
Center for Renewing America

body:
Herschel needs every hand on deck.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870399:6D53mrGNB:m:1:3368395361:612D8A625EC00220C738EC72093110E2:r)
---
Peter,
---
Our fight to take back our country is far from over.
---
With the fate of Georgia's must-win Senate seat still hanging in the balance, my good friend Herschel Walker needs our support now more than ever.
---
**That 's why I'm personally sending my campaign team down to GA to give Herschel the final push he needs to WIN his runoff election.**
---
__But we can 't afford to send our team empty-handed.__
---
I'm counting on my top supporters like YOU - who already delivered an incredible victory here in Texas - to help me provide Herschel with both the team and resources he needs to **FLIP** this Senate seat.
---
**[Please make an urgent contribution to help Herschel WIN his runoff election now that my team is inbound to Georgia.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870399:6D53mrGNB:m:1:3368395361:612D8A625EC00220C738EC72093110E2:r)**

Peter, nearly 6 months ago I reached out asking you to help Herschel with just a day left in his primary...
---
...And the outpouring of support you showed him was truly incredible.
---
_And now, with so much at stake, I have to ask that you join me in standing with Herschel once again when it matters most._

_**This runoff will be won by a RAZOR-THIN MARGIN, and every dollar our team brings with them to Georgia could be the difference between victory and defeat.**_

Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. body:
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b0dcb7ee0f944b585faaea8278eaad9&_e=c_1CFAMMPkw24JU4KJCImV5nTZly6jhewRpHGjQ9hvdau8z5C9rI1ZDc5vTkjbUu0AxWjg2XpJFPf4XgVcyIVxzHh9yUQYIysFtj857lzc03Kxbdr5A3uWyFjm5OK9EYiZ5DgaWp3Q08CCsQC3q1YoY7YTEm9Vxla-T9MMNeZZ8IxsoiryItKZImJPkgJLDQoVHXMDmqINuCR8fwxcowc3tS17QXEM1CP5SOTBpfh1EYRayuHyJNbhtoUN27mllT7Zl0r2pPMQwXN6Cui9A73UigQMPn3NQVC3Rsv2rOba5sOAE8_LRZ3CMslj-3JOOi-yCVvGLjRere4EZYscNCgsgGNhR13kKuyXNnZjjNx2uzpQIJOBal9Mt60jv3SPnEpHJqt9CHSk9d-q3X_OsAVozcD9zzk_nqGHy5MrkMwHI%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b0dcb7ee0f944b585faaea8278eaad9&_e=c_1CFAMMPkw24JU4KJCImV5nTZly6jhewRpHGjQ9hvdau8z5C9rI1ZDc5vTkjbUu0AxWjg2XpJFPf4XgVcyIVxzHh9yUQYIysFtj857lzc03Kxbdr5A3uWyFjm5OK9EYiZ5DgaWp3Q08CCsQC3q1YoY7YTEm9Vxla-T9MMNeZZ8IxsoiryItKZImJPkgJLDQoVHXMDmqINuCR8fwxcowc50VOlLk1nBPzjqmoAYbcD9pq5wOmcYV34wT8yiJDROtIC1V7M5d6ZWgJWmpVQk9W_4M3dLCYR2eUuXGVpIJxGJ_De03cPechWTY1nth1od3FsEHJEaWHtKmGEGAz0UWwN2azAnvQAD4JjHoo_TOc4uiMYY1qT3m4secOf84vqpOB8XMdujqQ7y5w-Cukfcz-MI8m8x2K14QH0K4DF2HhIQ%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Yes, it's happening again, Peter.

We have another runoff election in Georgia on our hands, and AFP Action has boots on the ground to mobilize voters one more time for this critical Senate race!

Let me be clear: Georgians have two VERY different options...

❌ Re-elect Raphael Warnock - He promised to support working families, but instead went to Washington and voted to for reckless spending and bills that led to record-high inflation, tax increases, and government overreach.

OR

✅ Elect Herschel Walker - He's a political outsider who will defend the Constitution, protect our fundamental freedoms, and tackle inflation head-on by reining in government spending.

Peter, I won't lie to you, it's going to be a tough battle. Runoffs are all about turnout, and Walker and Warnock are neck and neck. Every vote and every dollar will make a difference, and we only have 21 days to reach our goal of knocking 600,000 doors for Herschel Walker. So I'm urgently asking:

subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863263:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 23 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863263:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863264:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863265:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863266:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863263:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61863263:JUzfmrGNS:m:1:3374012347:B2E71F145B852900D0E5782B7B5637FC:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

Herschel Walker

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: An update on my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
As we have seen in previous elections, it takes time to count every vote from every county. This process takes diligence.

| Peter,

I want to start by saying thank you for your support throughout our entire campaign.

As of right now, our race is currently too close to call. There are still ballots coming in, and the margins are too close for anything to be called at this point.

**County election officials are hard at work tabulating those votes. And they’re going to be tabulating them for the next few days.**

I know we’re all eager to find out who won each of these incredibly important races, but we will need to be patient and wait for every vote to be counted. **Because every single vote matters, and every single vote counts equally — whether you voted by mail, dropped off your ballot at a secure drop box, or voted in person.

[_That’s why our focus is now turning to defend our election processes to make sure all voices are heard in this race and every last vote is counted. clean_body: As we have seen in previous elections, it takes time to count every vote from every county. This process takes diligence. | Peter, I want to start by saying thank you for your support throughout our entire campaign. As of right now, our race is currently too close to call. There are still ballots coming in, and the margins are too close for anything to be called at this point. County election officials are hard at work tabulating those votes. And they’re going to be tabulating them for the next few days. I know we’re all eager to find out who won each of these incredibly important races, but we will need to be patient and wait for every vote to be counted. Because every single vote matters, and every single vote counts equally — whether you voted by mail, dropped off your ballot at a secure drop box, or voted in person. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = We know my opponent and her allies have been sowing doubt and confusion throughout this campaign, and it’s unacceptable that they were spreading misinformation last week while people were exercising their right to vote. I have every confidence that the counties administering this election conducted a free and fair election, and their results will be accurate. But they will take time, so prepare for a few more days of counting. Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869730:6aTRmrGjN:m:1:3350876382:8F7AF38C542FA8A8CCB697DEA0B1B6CA:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869730:6aTRmrGjN:m:1:3350876382:8F7AF38C542FA8A8CCB697DEA0B1B6CA:r)**

name: Giffords.org
subject: #winning
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Election night was a big night for gun safety. The voters spoke, and their message was heard loud and clear.
#

Friends -
Election night was a big night for gun safety. Voters spoke, and their message was heard loud and clear.
Gun safety was one of the top five issues according to voters—more than education, more than climate change.
By a margin of +16 percent, voters in exit polls said they wanted stronger gun laws.
And when gun safety was on the ballot directly, it passed.
In Oregon, Measure 114 said that anyone who wants to buy a gun needs to pass a background check, get fingerprinted, share a photo ID, AND complete a firearm safety class.
It won.
Ten years ago, gun safety was an issue that didn’t make exit polls and most Democrats were afraid to talk about it directly.
Today it is a TOP winning issue.
That only happened because of our work over the years. It’s only happening because of the movement we built together.
We can’t stop now:
[**Today is a great day to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC. We will put it right to work passing stronger gun laws in Congress and communities across the country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221114-1-15&t=1&akid=2743%2E3935704%2E8eaxdN)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82212ced06fd4d78a7b972694a9370fb&_e=KxiiwUJsKcllIEExA4_D2BoPQy6ORlWvtU4LOPQnb5XKLfFV9E2AG2S0lX3NTYvp53OFvV5thL8lXBY6Y997md4zNI56fqGEYaVMz8hvG7mYgjIjpyOStos7GfIhXqUIEl6BGfzQISoFgKo30iqegoIoGYY8OLHswsaL0OJdLC_iMMUzEN1GPMTbeGdDhMGHoLEHZHxY9y53A5jriSyJJkymexYEPbU2j6oz38ejxJIdsLIWyVdq0Nb9D3QjbznluwOh3PDuDFnWepqhTGiEARB3UePuT3Ux4knQdXJ3U59XCy_QeMKm0K39P6f7M_ttadwJGNo2Cq_hBIR_Ijz2baf0Hlcogzp4YLU08rucnImyf8RSpeIddfQIixnh2UcONo3o6Pgre0oGX17tK4erbLxcUyof5HlOCJ2d2uKPMrA%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82212ced06fd4d78a7b972694a9370fb&_e=KxiiwUJsKcllIEExA4_D2BoPQy6ORlWvtU4LOPQnb5XKLfFV9E2AG2S0lX3NTYvp53OFvV5thL8lXBY6Y997md4zNI56fqGEYaVMz8hvG7mYgjIjpyOStos7GfIhXqUIEl6BGfzQISoFgKo30iqegoIoGYY8OLHswsaL0OJdLC_iMMUzEN1GPMTbeGdDhMGHoLEHZHxY9y53A5jriSyJJjgtVMP3rdbD-1G3JvT0cpdIgKOqc0rxv7CQAgMVkxnPimCpcSrsBwYHLvyf_wF9JIu938dH-4OYDc_PUSaWkbonO0mwH5UcVGjiM-1WJhP5uIgpwpxwdI8UUqoKsF1zhjhzRgtuSt4q3OXLr3j3fHf4hHptLdlSI3zQkrri6eW6GLUldICu0zvzC6D1m9a9yUPo82ZLqW9WIB7PRBLa9kc%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado " It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29. Reserve your spot here: I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith. Warm Regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Making history in Georgia
| **We told you** Raphael Warnock is headed to another runoff election!

**And we told you** if we win this runoff, we'll EXPAND our Senate majority.

**Now we 're ecstatic... _because TOP Democrats really STEPPED UP!_ But we can't slow down for even one minute:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34291?t=6&akid=5372%2E878179%2EjXby4q) | [**WE 'RE EXTENDING OUR GOAL BY $10,000 TO LOCK-IN A WIN. CHIP IN $7 TO HELP DEMOCRATS LIKE WARNOCK WIN THEIR RUNOFFS AND EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34292?t=7&akid=5372%2E878179%2EjXby4q)
---
**Listen, we can 't take our foot off the gas just yet.**

If Trump-endorsed MAGA stooge Herschel Walker seizes this seat, we'll be stuck in the same legislative gridlock we've seen for the past 2 years!

Sen. Warnock is our __best chance__ at expanding our Senate majority. Without his victory, Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema will control Biden's agenda...

**_So we can 't let the momentum slow down now!_**
[Look, the GOP will stop at NOTHING to destroy our progress, so we're raising the bar. Chip in $7 RIGHT NOW to our extended $10,000 goal to help Democrats like Warnock win their runoffs and expand our Senate majority! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34293?t=8&akid=5372%2E878179%2EjXby4q)

name: Joe Kent
subject: This isn't over.
body:
Peter,
While left-wing media are trying to convince you my election is over, let me re-assure you it is not.
There remain over twelve-thousands of ballots left to count, and we anticipate ten thousand ballots that were rejected that we can cure.
We are very much in this fight. Will you help us prevail by contributing at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/D7cgiDRV6dGTthKGBM23ww/AaOq892a72zlwttlerYxWc2A)?
Everyone on our team, including me, is driving all over the district to knock on the doors of voters who've had their ballots rejected. We also have live call centers dialing these voters and we're sending them text messages.
Please help us offset the expense of this by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/D7cgiDRV6dGTthKGBM23ww/AaOq892a72zlwttlerYxWc2A).
We can turn this around in the final days but only if you help.

Joe Kent

clean_body: Peter, While left-wing media are trying to convince you my election is over, let me re-assure you it is not. There remain over twelve-thousands of ballots left to count, and we anticipate ten thousand ballots that were rejected that we can cure. We are very much in this fight. Will you help us prevail by contributing at ? Everyone on our team, including me, is driving all over the district to knock on the doors of voters who've had their ballots rejected. We also have live call centers dialing these voters and we're sending them text messages. Please help us offset the expense of this by donating today at . We can turn this around in the final days but only if you help. Thank you and God bless, Joe Kent

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e10e9259f9b434bb7b39f25e87b8e2b&_e=vL7oPumKdcqtuW7LajVR3jBI9cfR4FClnkaN8YuJ1mFFd17BK3m0Dft079FCJOxPBa0rDVMd66lRvCfJMZhbUEHap9jI_--D0SrnPww938x6FKQQJPT60n-Impx0DYBmeF1M5wjfiKTHC9uA_O_exKxqX2XjS9lnaZRZEP-IUhuzH50qh-OiAJd9FXnrMKbqSS6_WU1ZkLay-UEAR4mjxVUIGY087TucelPhP-8e6xZV9_Aaa0joIwUEdp3BbutbE4gKDlaeIaTjpoXyvnV1O5Ep_Iwc1d4r3jTCF-4aswuPS0n87XDDufD8wvVNyed0dNMcCAbl5gOZG1ZeK86wsbttUXJjNnFMygZ03h2xA_l8Y6sdPx0bUbi7ttBW6HhOHu6x6IxYobEQWS68LkU-oxyRX3oKsFEhTNi5G36sCjg%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e10e9259f9b434bb7b39f25e87b8e2b&_e=vL7oPumKdcqtuW7LajVR3jBI9cfR4FClnkaN8YuJ1mFFd17BK3m0Dft079FCJOxPBa0rDVMd66lRvCfJMZhbUEHap9jI_--D0SrnPww938x6FKQQJPT60n-Impx0DYBmeF1M5wjfiKTHC9uA_O_exKxqX2XjS9lnaZRZEP-IUhuzH50qh-OiAJd9FXnrMKbqSS6_WU1ZkLay-UEAR4mjxXrVgXqZM_uL-jpsacWhzwtk9WrgbinbuzZqzhaUvd8Ec6nRgCaDJIFh-4EkWFooFIThVfH2vySHQ-O0F_gR-Z8bDsPjlqQm-eNyEb0D0NYM7RwkzKi8xui1sdaPV_S0-U6QY77tU6l5UNJtznARVzjDohhQ4NkSvp3sLWMMgFoP9tY9-BXRarpygnavXWxXmLcj-WbLORNGXieRJ7mIZK8%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:

Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ddb094430ffc4ca5a6aefa83ca1e6154&_e=kZ6YksJcRkOLNsd4r87DTH81WCksYedz0HPUycQ5kTz3axvz-oDm9lD2PFjowgBqd1JdpokdfvyFrwFZDz4E6LdaXuOFVdtM2-c5r3ukNBbl_SkyBO_-6mfReV4I0LxuEsCTmUkLds23S8WRWrSanIg48SGqRlJ8RdrJ1IlKb-FtwibhpXld2_n36kScp8kfazS-DVDS4JCIkEWBWF8lYfblaupzEHw4R4X6YMptl2XNz--4_c96poiQJmaEenUV)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ddb094430ffc4ca5a6aefa83ca1e6154&_e=kZ6YksJcRkOLNsd4r87DTH81WCksYedz0HPUycQ5kTz3axvz-oDm9lD2PFjowgBqd1JdpokdfvyFrwFZDz4E6LdaXuOFVdtM2-c5r3ukNBZGZQEyPL9V1YMIiZUhMsqeCEvCPRwZfIOIGaaxasNFhjCBaq2lYT0iXYOR41FhGZemlIF-06XJ4M2FEvzxq2relG6gf8c4v1OKxVnclIOVE-9c3hL0clsyJXXNSVofqgt7Vwm3A2rZbhXEa8a3dF0N)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ddb094430ffc4ca5a6aefa83ca1e6154&_e=kZ6YksJcRkOLNsd4r87DTH81WCksYedz0HPUycQ5kTz3axvz-oDm9lD2PFjowgBqd1JdpokdfvyFrwFZDz4E6LdaXuOFVdtM2-c5r3ukNBYGnuHUUV3i9aQLzY2JkqngQqRHfjZvU-ikgbcF6b1lMTn8koDvczYy74CEw-qf-1BQY0RKN7JRXbwRCxsThKWFso7HQs_4C3UIAG3hO-BB87NxVQSpuXPcyJQMmTsHM9VcAc3Jl8ldeLGXpn9yA4ex)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
