name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His case was thrown out. Then the FBI raided his home.
body:
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3eaa777e1644549ae302e59a746536c&_e=VO5QORG6nNSghiHQdRo4xToX4RKPSd5EENbRuQZJk6miYYDdc9dTSb4q6zMEWYzKu1hsicHm7ACEyjAVqLmlSZRuQYrLyqh3wSKr4BQKFGRxdTWMIncv-akCh1GEQlPVuNi-KfwcdMcQzvjpkQD6HOBz9JjqMixwGh9U5YTswM5j-h0dLPM89K217q3usjz10_mN7uQ_1AS5xPfT_cB7giK7u_O4rBlJpfZ1fgp0qS1MFYfYjRjzelP9goWPdm0la-IGFQiGbqddI5WfNXFeegTalR0piH1C3qarOfNi4I5kseVU_NpaKAGA1HGSntaKza6YALPAg338QkKsM2DWaakNtXutv5kLH_6zJkCAic8%3D) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. _And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3eaa777e1644549ae302e59a746536c&_e=VO5QORG6nNSghiHQdRo4xToX4RKPSd5EENbRuQZJk6miYYDdc9dTSb4q6zMEWYzKu1hsicHm7ACEyjAVqLmlSZRuQYrLyqh3wSKr4BQKFGRxdTWMIncv-akCh1GEQlPVuNi-KfwcdMcQzvjpkQD6HOBz9JjqMixwGh9U5YTswM5j-h0dLPM89K217q3usjz10_mN7uQ_1AS5xPfT_cB7guu8k_Pj79D3HqOMwmbKg6zwSidgzkY1trZ-BiXd2jnm6WUn4S1NeD5woiEuVhMyTlyz7bbFxNth6A3lKNGBUkrEfiDW-jy7q-W_fQZSLBHpom_V6OF_phDm8OPfVnHB_cqEtFcbVjgAY2uu_kxk1Ns%3D) Now, I'll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. **That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY** **LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? **Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ " That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict. And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3eaa777e1644549ae302e59a746536c&_e=VO5QORG6nNSghiHQdRo4xToX4RKPSd5EENbRuQZJk6miYYDdc9dTSb4q6zMEWYzKu1hsicHm7ACEyjAVqLmlSZRuQYrLyqh3wSKr4BQKFGRxdTWMIncv-akCh1GEQlPVuNi-KfwcdMcQzvjpkQD6HOBz9JjqMixwGh9U5YTswM5j-h0dLPM89K217q3usjz10_mN7uQ_1AS5xPfT_cB7gu55Zdv8k7Jm8SSm4qvQHe16M-SLoNujTbgQB9wlNLECdOtDyJ2HbKXq78fpl52n1Ln8fWAyaDuiNG26Mw4Wmy0xGkQJGokrVRzh4zHMTTOkFQ5Eowd7gS1SOIS9qKPzPeJ1d82BTGlWvRR5nBDoRXA%3D) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**. So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3eaa777e1644549ae302e59a746536c&_e=VO5QORG6nNSghiHQdRo4xToX4RKPSd5EENbRuQZJk6miYYDdc9dTSb4q6zMEWYzKu1hsicHm7ACEyjAVqLmlSZRuQYrLyqh3wSKr4BQKFGRxdTWMIncv-akCh1GEQlPVuNi-KfwcdMcQzvjpkQD6HOBz9JjqMixwGh9U5YTswM5j-h0dLPM89K217q3usjz10_mN7uQ_1AS5xPfT_cB7gk1YpArhum1M1vGH78khYN29u13Wjq-048XiupVc8_HPYeaJbqi2Ep7nDMxzHnSc1Nb-8Vf0YuduVgYLkAY-onaLOugabv-3NZKIiw4IPgwktIWLcnlExRB2y78fQ8-0vxuxa9YnKsDfg5iaH-Smtx0%3D), before it's too late. For Life,
---
---
Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3eaa777e1644549ae302e59a746536c&_e=VO5QORG6nNSghiHQdRo4xToX4RKPSd5EENbRuQZJk6miYYDdc9dTSb4q6zMEWYzKu1hsicHm7ACEyjAVqLmlSZRuQYrLyqh3wSKr4BQKFGRxdTWMIncv-akCh1GEQlPVuNi-KfwcdMcQzvjpkQD6HOBz9JjqMixwGh9U5YTswM5j-h0dLPM89K217q3usjz10_mN7uQ_1AS5xPfT_cB7gl5ZTezdAqMp6LtdvXOcKWAtDskZEgEOhlaUxyg1R3tueRITjFR4ZdQJXqvQuLg3eW6vN0mJ9rwAXvDOTx9BvyILL-VHhVh7fYZRg-aCtvkVaT-YrPRir3VElgxCpXkb50if0TJWMUi7B6xohTDcTMw%3D)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). clean_body: | | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already had thrown it out. Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute). Make no mistake, this is the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, this is retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, this is an assault on all pro-life Americans. Now, I'll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces 11 years in prison and up to $350,000 in fines. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND. Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can. "We can get to you. We can get to your family. " That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict. And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply. So please hurry. , before it's too late. For Life, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Thanks to YOU, the Democratic Coalition is strong!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Last week, Democrats came out and made their voices heard. While the votes are still being counted, last week we lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic president’s first midterm election in over 40 years. We made calls, knocked on doors, and showed up for our communities so that our communities could show up in government.

The work isn’t over - the Georgia Senate runoff is right around the corner on December 6 - but Team Coalitions is grateful to each and every one of you for using your voice to elect diverse Democrats up and down the ballot. Thank you for being a part of history!

---
|
---
| History Made!
In this midterm election, we had [historic wins up and down the ballot](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d3ef7b712f&e=d6c5c7d7ec), working to make our party more reflective of the real America
---
|
---
| Delia Ramirez became the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest. Andrea Campbell became the first Black woman elected attorney general of Massachusetts. [Rhode Island elected its first two Asian American state legislators.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4b70f82daa&e=d6c5c7d7ec) The list goes on and on - Democrats continue to make history! Young voters especially made their voices heard and showed up for Democrats, with Maxwell Frost in Florida being elected the first Gen-Z member of Congress. Data shows that across the country, voters 18-29 [overwhelmingly backed Democrats](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5b0dcd9b84&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and that [“the 2022 election had the second highest voter turnout among voters under 30 in at least the past three decades.”](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2cb60622f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Youth voters understand that Democrats are here to help move our country in the right direction.
---
|
---
| Georgia On My Mind
---
|
---
| Because no one reached 50% in the general, Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock is headed to a RUNOFF against Republican Herschel Walker! And we need to knock on as many doors and make as many calls as possible to WIN.
Interested in doing your part? [Click here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=223e3c101c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) if you are out of state but want to travel to help knock on doors for Raphael Warnock in Georgia.
---
| [Click Here to Knock Doors](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=50776003f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Click Here to Knock Doors")
---
| Unable to travel to Georgia but want to do everything you can to help in this runoff race? [Click here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=01abde4315&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to sign up for a shift to make calls and turn folks out to vote.
---
| [Click Here to Make Calls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fd7a081af7&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Click Here to Make Calls")
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=b3c8471264) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=b3c8471264).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I am ready to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Fellow American,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. **[Can you spare a few dollars to help me win this seat?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=21f924cd5ec74ff8b6c19582695e8b1e&_e=hGNHi_knxi06Lmv6iSmlWmwIpQ71oExClyq59zn8bwqqT5gUK3ZdAIxSVZuTxUaTRMNIrYT2sLQxm0heescIdQ55TZc-otwgFOXhMUUPvee_gzSYUKYB0eQXHLiyRxmN_Mqmny42G_hfCXtnu8MEbRIYd4WoPkjfTUesSFqAQXOolLiaH-Gh9eGnENwDNZpLk35y59QXKhN4MAfrxKJsPrv4BgUIIji7QD2jbLBqllcfNTP9JRv8gqXQwCiGaYLrksf1YtAvBZ7qpXX2ffHoIFetkZxmRug2EKjnKG4CMFfyo4hc9wFB4G-9-l7BaBENUx-UnCbFKiKISKFLnt9gkVOUyAH-dcDgrRDCh-wepoxntQnOnxgLlwhM2dU2oTdNtxnkkBgcsNQN1T3ruNhIeYzaep7KFX1YqijcBHBsYfRkCPevN4L3KiDuC0HWtEKx)**

I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help.

**[So Fellow American, would you please stand with me today by donating as little as $3.40 or even $34?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=21f924cd5ec74ff8b6c19582695e8b1e&_e=hGNHi_knxi06Lmv6iSmlWmwIpQ71oExClyq59zn8bwqqT5gUK3ZdAIxSVZuTxUaTRMNIrYT2sLQxm0heescIdQ55TZc-otwgFOXhMUUPvee_gzSYUKYB0eQXHLiyRxmN_Mqmny42G_hfCXtnu8MEbRIYd4WoPkjfTUesSFqAQXOolLiaH-Gh9eGnENwDNZpLk35y59QXKhN4MAfrxKJsPrv4BgUIIji7QD2jbLBqllcfNTP9JRv8gqXQwCiGaYLrksf1YtAvBZ7qpXX2ffHoIFetkZxmRug2EKjnKG4CMFetu-QqNBTAkUGViQLP5bYg7jCg1sGl8TGySawd0EtffrNP5rFF7WxeNDZJwiv3cfeaQa3niVxmdUEZ-7SyR0ah_ma9Zi6LWPxXcPhFIWz5lLHMukGSgfOoGTXaNEgylD2hze1Of0MM6s8KG2Hmk7bN) **

subject: this runoff is locked in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
We have some news, friend:

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Can you join me for a Zoom tomorrow?
body:
| Hi Friend -- I'd like us to come together tomorrow night via Zoom to recap the election and discuss next steps. We'll also hear from some awesome conflict resolution experts who will teach us how to diffuse challenging family/friend political conversations ahead of the holidays. I think we can all get a lot of value out of this one, plus we'll have an opportunity for optional breakout sessions for us all to meet other reasonable people of goodwill from around the country. **It's tomorrow night, Tuesday, November 15th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT.** [**Click here to RSVP for the Zoom link.**](https://www.country1st.com/fear_trust_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feartrust_nd&n=1) I know it's last minute, but can you make it? Country First, Adam

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Help my friend Raphael
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Inc
body:
[ stdin# ]One Georgia Leadership Committee

Derek,

I know you’re tired.

It’s been a long election year, and you’ve been asked to do a lot. Last
week’s results may not have been what we hoped for, but we are so close to
re-electing my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock to represent Georgians
in the Senate. [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6853?t=1002&akid=19120%2E1862389%2E8BhhJm ]So I’m asking you to do a little more.

I’ve been working alongside Senator Warnock for over a decade. During that
time, I have witnessed his commitment to the people of Georgia. As a
pastor, he has been a spiritual guide for those in their best moments and
their most difficult times. As a voting rights advocate, he has worked
tirelessly to ensure that everyone has the right to free and fair
elections in Georgia and across the country. And as a United States
Senator, Reverend Warnock has helped deliver billions of dollars to our
state, lower drug prices for seniors, advance the biggest climate
legislation in history and champion abortion rights for Georgia women
whose freedoms have been taken away.

What lies before us is even more important. A U.S. Supreme Court willing
to decimate our progress and roll back our rights. We deserve a champion
who will not flinch or leave us behind.

In short, Senator Warnock is the only candidate for the job. But we must
act now to help him win on December 6.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6853?t=1003&akid=19120%2E1862389%2E8BhhJm ]Will you please donate whatever you can to make sure we re-elect my
friend Raphael?

I know you’re tired. I am too. But we can’t slow down now. We only have a
few more weeks to make sure Democrats in Congress have the power to make
real change and protect our future.

All eyes are once again on Georgia, and now it’s time to get it done.

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6853?t=1004&akid=19120%2E1862389%2E8BhhJm ]DONATE TO WARNOCK

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Paid for by One Georgia Inc. Approved by Abrams for Governor. |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+

One Georgia Inc.
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #345
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

We can accept unlimited funds from individuals or entities, including
LLCs, corporations, 501(c)4s, PACs and every type of labor union account.
Under Georgia law, all contributions to the One Georgia Leadership
Committee must be disclosed with the donor’s name, address, occupation,
and employer.

Contributions to One Georgia Inc. are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=19120%2E1862389%2E8BhhJm ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=19120%2E1862389%2E8BhhJm

name: Team Evergreen
subject: "Now is the time for the doers."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Catch up on our virtual event!
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4379?t=2&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv) Friend, This is huge: Just months after passing historic climate legislation, Democrats across the country have defied historic trends and achieved one of the best midterms for the sitting president's party in recent memory. And after Thursday's post-election deep dive with Dr. Leah Stokes, Donnel Baird, and Bill McKibben (who dialed in from COP27 in Egypt!), we're more fired up than ever about what's coming next for climate action. [_**_Miss the event? No worries—click here to catch up with a recording._**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4379?t=3&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4379?t=4&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv) | [LISTEN NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4379?t=5&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv)
---
**Our panel of climate champions shared exciting insights about global climate action, on-the-ground clean energy efforts, and policy priorities—check it out!**
* * *
"There's a certain bounce in everyone's step [at COP27] because, in large measure, of the outcome of the midterms on Tuesday...
I just happened across an old friend who leads the climate efforts of a big country—he said [the Inflation Reduction Act] really goosed everybody in our Parliament to be pushing harder to do our part."
—Bill McKibben
* * *
"Now is the time for the doers, for the implementers, for the folks who are really ready to roll up their sleeves and dig into the details."
—Donnel Baird
* * *
"The delay cannot continue—we have to see the EPA in particular act with strong executive action."
—Dr. Leah Stokes
* * *
With hundreds of billions of dollars from the Inflation Reduction Act heading out the door, it's clear: Now is the time to focus on state-level climate leadership, as well as aggressive executive climate action from President Biden. [_**Catch up on the event now, and get ready to make major strides toward our clean energy future together.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4379?t=6&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv)
Onward,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2022 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=13118%2E53494%2EKRt7sv)

name: Christie
subject: Checking in with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/10988?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-Christie-StrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-Christie-StrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=8658%2E9716520%2E0LfN0n)
---
With Georgia going to a runoff and our chance to expand our Senate majority hanging in the balance, it's essential that I hear from top supporters like you.

**That's why, after careful consideration, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Senate Majority Strategy Group.**

We need to make every possible effort to make sure Democrats win this runoff and expand our majority. The handful of folks in this group will provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and help solidify our official strategy to defend Senator Warnock and fight back against the GOP.

This group’s strategic decisions helped us flip the Senate in another Georgia runoff two years ago, so I’m confident your input will help us win this final battle to expand our majority.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/10988?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221114-Christie-StrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221114-Christie-StrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=8658%2E9716520%2E0LfN0n)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm thankful to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=8658_9716520_0LfN0n&akid=8658%2E9716520%2E0LfN0n)**.

Thanks to the GOP, Georgia election laws are constantly changing, and this year the runoff elections have been moved up to December 6. **That’s a month sooner than the last time we were in this situation, which means our timeline to reach voters has been drastically shortened.**

We don’t have a lot of time, Peter. We need resources to make up for this time crunch and work as hard as possible to keep Reverend Warnock in the Senate where he can fight for us. To do it, we need you to join us for one final push toward holding this seat.

[**_With the voting timeline shortened, every donation has an outsized impact. If we can overwhelm the GOP in Georgia with our Field Team early on, they won’t have time to react and counter our efforts. Can we count on you to donate $5 right now and inflict a knockout blow toward GOP hopes of controlling GA’s Senate seat?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54608200/379048428/294255004?refcode=EM_FR_221114MMRunoffs_N_CAUCUS_30DO_5_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTFiNDViYS02NTY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgRd0e7ieEtM7Wu5pduVag5A9qO5azoDlLo2zz5MbR8=)

clean_body: Warnock is battle-tested and ready to win. = Peter, we’ve been here before. Remember the last election when control for the Senate hinged upon Reverend Warnock winning a runoff election in Georgia? After the midterm results, it looks like Warnock is set for another runoff. That bodes well for Democrats because last time, Warnock came out solidly on top. We can do it again, Peter, but just like last time, he’s going to need our help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks to the GOP, Georgia election laws are constantly changing, and this year the runoff elections have been moved up to December 6. That’s a month sooner than the last time we were in this situation, which means our timeline to reach voters has been drastically shortened. We don’t have a lot of time, Peter. We need resources to make up for this time crunch and work as hard as possible to keep Reverend Warnock in the Senate where he can fight for us. To do it, we need you to join us for one final push toward holding this seat. = = We’re in this together, Georgia House Democrats The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today? = Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus PO Box 18622 Atlanta, GA 31126 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, I can't defend my critical seat without your immediate support.

Team, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $3 or more right now between me and Peter Welch to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5088?t=2&akid=1210%2E61531%2E-Seu9k)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**
[**Please, will you split a donation of $3 or more now between me and Peter Welch so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5088?t=3&akid=1210%2E61531%2E-Seu9k)

| | This can't wait, Peter: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**

**_[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54608327/379049209/1583625711?refcode=20221114.4_RW_A27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2NlODY1MC02NzY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hkTQcHMymShA7XRdECyAYaNv9Unvtr3UqMXpNsbbagU=)_**

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.

**We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**

I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, Peter:

clean_body: | | | This can't wait, Peter: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win. = Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election. We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, Peter: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for coming through when it matters most. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869825:JkGzYrGN2:m:1:3368395361:FD3494DA0BA25E8045B806F94B1D69B8:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869825:JkGzYrGN2:m:1:3368395361:FD3494DA0BA25E8045B806F94B1D69B8:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61869825:JkGzYrGN2:m:1:3368395361:FD3494DA0BA25E8045B806F94B1D69B8:r)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: We did it, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=03bae92677&e=292fde286a)
---
| Dear Peter,

I am incredibly humbled by the results of this election, and I wanted to reach out to thank you personally, Peter, for supporting me and believing in our campaign.

I am eternally grateful to you and every one of our grassroots supporters who made this historic victory possible. Every door knock, every endorsement, and every donation mattered. This win was only possible with your help.

The voters of San Mateo County and San Francisco have spoken, and from the looks of the returns, they have overwhelmingly chosen to send an experienced and proven progressive to Congress to carry on the powerful legacy of Jackie Speier.
---
| | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=8491e5fce7&e=292fde286a)
---
|
You have my word that on Day One in Washington I will redouble my efforts to deliver on the issues that matter most. Together we can tackle the toughest issues of our day like safeguarding and strengthening our democracy, codifying reproductive rights, mitigating the worst impacts of our climate crisis, and building an economy that truly works for all Americans.

>From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of Jessica, the twins, and Team Mullin, thank you.

Kevin Mullin
---
| | |

name: Our Revolution
subject: Don't miss tonight's call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

Come celebrate our progressive wins from the midterm with US Rep. Ro
Khanna, talk about what is next during the lame duck session with
Greenpeace USA Policy and Political Director Alice Martin, and Progressive
Internation Communications Director James Schneider on our LIVE National
Organizing Call TONIGHT at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT.

We’ll also strategize around the Georgia runoff, our Black Friday actions
to Make Amazon Pay, and stopping the Dirty Deal again! You won’t want to
miss this.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]RSVP HERE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Progressives Outperform in Midterms! | Fetterman Flips Senate
Seat | Georgia Runoff | 7 New Allies in Congress | Keith Ellison’s Victory
| Megan Green Wins in St. Louis | AOC on NYPAN’s Leadership | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1013&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

Thank you to everyone who made calls, volunteered, and donated to Our
Revolution’s massive GOTV effort in this pivotal midterm election!

With your help, we beat back the far right, flipped a Senate seat, elected
7 new allies to Congress, and expanded progressive power up and down the
ballot.

Your donations and volunteerism powered our work on the ground and online
— turning out progressives, young voters, and working-class folks, who
were the margin of victory in top races with tight margins around the
country.

Our organizers and volunteers made more than 4 million voter contacts — 2
million calls and texts! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1014&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]Through collective action, we are lifting the
progressive movement into power.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1015&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

We proved in this election that progressive policy and organizing are a
roadmap for victory.

“Our populist economic message powered John Fetterman to victory in a
critical battleground state and elected the largest progressive voting
bloc in Congress while preventing a red wave,” said Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese.

Progressive candidates won nearly every race they ran in with campaigns
focused on the fight for justice, reproductive rights, and improving the
standard of living of their constituents.

“Bread and butter issues resonated with voters who want a government that
puts the needs of working people ahead of the rich and powerful,” Joseph
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1016&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

With progressives growing their margins in Congress, Democrats should take
note of the powerfully fought and won campaigns, driven by progressive
ideals, that galvanized voters.

“This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats
must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it
off,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8011?t=1017&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]The Guardian.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1018&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to keep growing our
movement and our impact between elections — we have a lot of work to do
before 2024!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1019&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

FETTERMAN FLIPS SENATE SEAT

Dr. Oz is headed back to New Jersey after the right-wing spent $100
million trying to defeat John Fetterman — and lost!

Our Revolution volunteers made over 260,000 voter contacts in PA and
helped Fetterman outperform President Biden in every county — flipping
some red counties blue.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1020&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

“I’m proud of what we ran on,” Fetterman said in his victory speech
Tuesday night. “Protecting a woman’s right to choose, raising our minimum
wage, fighting for the union way of life, healthcare as a human right,
standing up to corporate greed, making more things here in America,
standing up for our democracy...”

He dedicated this win to every person who has felt left behind and
everyone who has been knocked down and had to get back up.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1021&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

Celebrate this BIG WIN in PA by getting your Fetterman sticker in his
iconic shorts and hoodie — while supplies last!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7676?t=1022&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]GET YOUR STICKER NOW!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1023&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

GEARING UP FOR GEORGIA RUNOFF

Now, we must focus our work in Georgia, where a runoff election between
Sen. Raphael Warnock and Trump’s handpicked candidate Herschel Walker will
determine the fate of the Senate.

From now to December 6th, we must outwork and out-organize the coming
surge of money and Republican propaganda.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1024&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

In 2020, our targeted voter outreach boosted turnout by 11% to help
Senator Warnock win his first Georgia runoff — and we need a repeat
performance.

Can we count on you to help us cut through the attack ads, make personal
connections with voters, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1025&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1026&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

That’s right — we elected 7 new allies to the House on Tuesday — vastly
growing the power of our progressive voting bloc in Congress!

Organizing overpowered big money to clinch wins for Greg Casar (TX-35),
Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Maxwell Frost (FL-10), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine
Crockett (TX-30), Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), Becca Balint (VT).

“Progressives had a good night,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8013?t=1027&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]Slate wrote. “Despite major efforts
by various outside spending groups to move the Democratic Party to the
right during the primaries, the leftward push continues.”

“We’ll have a historic number of progressives, true progressives, in
Congress,” Our Revolution member and US Rep-elect Greg Casar told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7983?t=1028&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]In
These Times.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1029&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]Become a recurring donor to Our Revolution to support our work as we
partner with new allies in Congress to fight for our progressive policies!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1030&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

ELLISON VICTORY IN MINNESOTA

Minnesota AG Keith Ellison proved you can take on corporate criminals,
prosecute the police officer who murdered George Floyd and win
re-election!

Keith Ellison defended his progressive mantle after attacks from all
sides, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8014?t=1031&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]The Intercept reported. When you stand up to the powerful, you
get powerful enemies — but with the help of Our Revolution volunteers who
made over 100,000 personal calls to MN voters, Keith held his seat by a
20,000-vote margin!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1032&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

“Thanks to Our Revolution, we are going to continue our work to make sure
folks can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect —
every day,” Keith said.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1033&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]As a board member of Our Revolution, Keith Ellison knows our
inside-outside strategy for change will work. Sign up as a member today to
keep building progressive momentum!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1034&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

MAJOR WIN IN ST. LOUIS

Our Revolution-backed Megan Green won her grassroots campaign for
President of the St. Louis Board of Alderman against a wave of money from
big developers in the city.

Megan joins a growing bloc of progressive power in St. Louis that includes
Mayor Tishaura O. Jones and US Rep. Cori Bush, who was also re-elected on
Tuesday!

“An unapologetic progressive wins in the heartland, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8015?t=1035&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]STL Today wrote.
“Her victory puts an exclamation point on the rise of progressive
Democrats in the city.”

On the board, Megan helped pass a $15 min wage and she’ll be a strong
advocate for housing justice, good union jobs, strong neighborhoods, and
more as Board President.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1036&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

NYPAN & AOC ON NY POLITICS

Our Revolution: NY Progressive Action Network worked in solidarity with
Working Families Party NY to hold the line for narrow wins for Democrats.

While progressive organizers and trade union supporters worked tirelessly
to campaign across the state, NYPAN’s Executive Committee reported that
“the Democratic Party establishment itself was nowhere to be seen” and
their ad messaging “neglected the suffering of New Yorkers.”

US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8016?t=1037&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]The Intercept that in the
absence of state party leadership, organizations like Our Revolution-NYPAN
are rising up to lead.

“NYPAN’s organizing is very ripe to fill the role that the state
Democratic Party has left vacant,” AOC said. “An offshoot of the Our
Revolution chapters that cropped up all across New York state, NYPAN
retained their infrastructure and they are active across the state.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1038&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

PROGRESS THROUGH BALLOT MEASURES

In some states, abortion rights were literally on the ballot. And, in each
of the 5 states — MI, CA, KY, MT, and VT — the pro-choice position won!

Economic justice was also on the ballot. Supported by Our Revolution DC
and One Fair Wage, Initiative 82 passed 3:1 to end the sub-minimum wage
for tipped workers!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1039&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

In Illinois, Amendment 1 created a state constitutional right to
collective bargaining, and both Nevada and Nebraska voted to raise the
minimum wage.

And, folks in Maryland voted on ballot measures to legalize marijuana —
Missouri did the same and will expunge records for nonviolent
marijuana-related offenses.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1040&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1041&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

We must marshal our resources NOW to execute our strategy in Georgia all
the way through the run-off election on Dec. 6th! In the 2020 Georgia
runoff, we helped boost turnout for Warnock by 11 percent and our work can
make the difference again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1042&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ]DONATE TO OUR GEORGIA RUNOFF FUND!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8010?t=1043&akid=3733%2E5885482%2EKBlONP ][IMG]

CALLS to voters across the country and we’re keeping that energy going for
the Georgia run-off election. Volunteer with us to help elect Senator
Warnock, defeat Herschel Walker, and save the Senate!

Ro Khanna, talk about what is next during the lame duck session with Greenpeace USA Policy and Political Director Alice Martin, and Progressive Internation Communications Director James Schneider on our LIVE National Organizing Call TONIGHT at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT. We’ll also strategize around the Georgia runoff, our Black Friday actions to Make Amazon Pay, and stopping the Dirty Deal again! You won’t want to miss this. [ ]RSVP HERE HEADLINES: Progressives Outperform in Midterms! | Fetterman Flips Senate Seat | Georgia Runoff | 7 New Allies in Congress | Keith Ellison’s Victory | Megan Green Wins in St. Louis | AOC on NYPAN’s Leadership | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Thank you to everyone who made calls, volunteered, and donated to Our Revolution’s massive GOTV effort in this pivotal midterm election! With your help, we beat back the far right, flipped a Senate seat, elected 7 new allies to Congress, and expanded progressive power up and down the ballot. Your donations and volunteerism powered our work on the ground and online — turning out progressives, young voters, and working-class folks, who were the margin of victory in top races with tight margins around the country. Our organizers and volunteers made more than 4 million voter contacts — 2 million calls and texts! [ ]Through collective action, we are lifting the progressive movement into power. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We proved in this election that progressive policy and organizing are a roadmap for victory. “Our populist economic message powered John Fetterman to victory in a critical battleground state and elected the largest progressive voting bloc in Congress while preventing a red wave,” said Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese. Progressive candidates won nearly every race they ran in with campaigns focused on the fight for justice, reproductive rights, and improving the standard of living of their constituents. “Bread and butter issues resonated with voters who want a government that puts the needs of working people ahead of the rich and powerful,” Joseph said. [ ][IMG] With progressives growing their margins in Congress, Democrats should take note of the powerfully fought and won campaigns, driven by progressive ideals, that galvanized voters. “This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it off,” Joseph told [ ]The Guardian. [ ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to keep growing our movement and our impact between elections — we have a lot of work to do before 2024! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] FETTERMAN FLIPS SENATE SEAT Dr. Oz is headed back to New Jersey after the right-wing spent $100 million trying to defeat John Fetterman — and lost! Our Revolution volunteers made over 260,000 voter contacts in PA and helped Fetterman outperform President Biden in every county — flipping some red counties blue. Raphael Warnock and Trump’s handpicked candidate Herschel Walker will determine the fate of the Senate. From now to December 6th, we must outwork and out-organize the coming surge of money and Republican propaganda. [ ][IMG] In 2020, our targeted voter outreach boosted turnout by 11% to help Senator Warnock win his first Georgia runoff — and we need a repeat performance. Can we count on you to help us cut through the attack ads, make personal connections with voters, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all? clean_body: Check out what Katie had to say about America’s future | | | | | Peter, Senator-elect Katie Britt joined Fox & Friends this morning to discuss why she’s excited to fight for our future. Katie is working to save the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. As the youngest Republican woman to ever serve in the Senate, a former businesswoman, and the only female Republican Senator with school-aged children, Katie is uniquely qualified to be the advocate for families and for workers across America. Katie knows her historic victory on November 8th was all thanks to grassroots supporters like you, but the battle is still ongoing for America’s future. Right now in Georgia, Herschel Walker is heading toward a tough runoff. If we want any chance at securing the Senate in 2024, we must flip this seat NOW. Help Katie and Herschel by rushing in your support to keep Republican momentum going. It’s time for our nation to thrive again and for the American Dream to prosper. This can only happen under Republican leadership because unlike Biden and his Radical Democrats, we’re the party of parents and of hard working Americans. Thank you, Team Britt for Alabama | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: some thoughts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I want to start by saying thank you. Thank you. Thank you for voting. Thank you for volunteering. Thank you for giving. Thank you for talking to your family and friends. Just, thank you.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1363%2E5257348%2EeRBpIe)
Derek —
I want to start by saying thank you. **Thank you.**
Thank you for voting. Thank you for volunteering. Thank you for giving. Thank you for talking to your family and friends. Just, thank you.
**Last Tuesday night, I was reelected to serve the great people of California and its 30th Congressional District. And I can’t thank you enough. From the bottom of my heart.**
And I can’t wait to get back to work.
For weeks, the pundits and election forecasters hyped a “red wave” that turned into barely a “red ripple.” Then a “red nothing.”
Not all of the races have been called — here’s what we know: We kept the Senate blue, and the House is going to be within a couple seats either way.
But this much is clear — the forecasters, pundits and pollsters were wrong yet again, and those who cared about our democracy turned up to vote.
Those who wanted to protect our freedoms and rights turned up to vote.
And those who didn’t want Republican lies and chaos to engulf us all turned up to vote.
And as a result, we will be able to protect our democracy in the next two years in a way the pundits could not have predicted.
It wasn’t all good news, but it was a lot more good news than any of us expected. And we worked to make it happen. Knocking doors. Making calls.
_**Thanks to your generosity and support, I traveled to dozens of states, doing more than 150 events to support my colleagues and our challengers in competitive districts across the country.**_
I heard voters tell of their profound fears for the future of our country and democracy. But I saw the determination also, and watched as people rose to defend this great experiment in self-governance.
And my takeaway from the last six years is simply this:
You can have the best written Constitution in the world, and I believe we do. You can have the best written laws meant to constrain the worst impulses of human nature, and maybe we do. But none of it will be enough if people don’t give meaning to their oath of office, if they do not inform that oath with ideas of right and wrong, and if they are unwilling to accept the basic truth of things.
What we should look for in our elected officials is not whether they agree with us on every issue. (In fact, any elected who says they do should be greeted with great suspicion). But rather, we should look for people of character who will do the right thing, even when it is hard — especially when it is hard.
Thankfully, we had many people of good character run for Congress this cycle on the Democratic ticket, and with your help, voters saw the importance of electing them. Rejecting the big liars, and electing the truth tellers.
Now, the hard work continues. We’re going to find out in the coming days whether we fully beat the odds and defended the House in an upset for the ages, or if we will be up against an incredibly extreme (but incredibly small) Republican House Majority — and one determined to do crazy stuff, and to try to drag down Joe Biden.
We’re also going to find out whether our Senate Majority will be once again 50-50, or whether Rev. Warnock wins the Georgia runoff to make it 51-49.
_**I want to thank you again for being with me every step of the way. No matter how great the challenges. No matter how serious the obstacles. No matter what. You have been amazing.**_
Our challenge over the next two years is to demand better from our elected officials, to fix what’s broken, and to continue to stand up for our democracy.
I’m not giving up. Not by a long shot. And I know you aren’t either. We press on.
— Adam
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2022_abs_em.YLWDKC&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20221114_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1363%2E5257348%2EeRBpIe)
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Chuck Schumer. I’m just writing to say THANK YOU!

Because of YOU and every single Democrat reading this email, we completely defied history and **_kept the Senate blue!_** There was _no red wave_ , and it’s all thanks to the tireless hard work and passion of this grassroots team.

But our job is not finished yet: Georgia is once again heading to a runoff, and this time, it will decide whether we EXPAND our 50-50 majority -- something the pundits were calling a pipe dream just a few short days ago.

It's not going to be easy, either -- Raphael Warnock is already facing an attack-ad BLITZ from Mitch McConnell's megadonors, and he's going to need ALL of our support again to fight back and defeat his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent.

**[So I’m personally asking you: With the polls showing a neck-and-neck race, will you pitch in $5 (quadrupled to become $20!) right now to help Rev. Warnock win this crucial runoff and fight for the future of our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/10998?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221114-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221114-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=8678%2E9716520%2Edc8P83)**

I know what this grassroots team is capable of when we all come together. Two years ago when we defied the odds and flipped the Senate, I saw firsthand how this team showed up and fought hard to win in Georgia and secure this Democratic majority.

And now I’m asking you to stay in this fight. Winning in Georgia is critical to expanding our majority and passing President Biden's bold agenda. Going from a 50-50 deadlocked Senate to a 51-49 majority will make a HUGE difference -- you better believe it.

[**So please, if you can, chip in $5 (becomes $20!) before midnight to help Rev. clean_body: down to the wire | Fellow American, The most important Governor race of the 2022 cycle is coming down to the wire. The Arizona Governor's race is up in the air, and hundreds of thousands of votes are left out there to be counted. Our War Room of lawyers and data crunchers are working around the clock to make sure Kari Lake wins this election - but we need your help to keep it running until we win. Kari Lake needs to win this election if Arizonans want freedom and prosperity in their state. | We are officially in overtime and still need to rely on grassroots supporters to get us across the finish line. This is our chance to keep Radical Socialist policies out of AZ. It is our chance to stop the BROKEN Democrat agenda once and for all. Kari is counting on you now more than ever. With your support, we will get through to the finish line and Save America. Thanks for your support, Lake Campaign HQ

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're one step closer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia.
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say thank you.

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $3 between me and Maggie Hassan right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54610622/379058609/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2080-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA3MmY0ZS03NDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyWCQt-upMhJBuTvTKWgKTYVSE6b8N0_LguMroDJBvQ=)**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $3 or more right now between me and Maggie Hassan to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54610623/379058610/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2080-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA3MmY0ZS03NDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyWCQt-upMhJBuTvTKWgKTYVSE6b8N0_LguMroDJBvQ=)**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54610624/379058611/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2080-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA3MmY0ZS03NDY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyWCQt-upMhJBuTvTKWgKTYVSE6b8N0_LguMroDJBvQ=)

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Georgia run-off: serious gaps in turnout effort -- this is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
(TIME SENSITIVE)? ? ? ? ? 3X MATCH ACTIVE: Help us defeat Big Oil this November >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-
Peter ? this is bad ? really bad. We've just received word that a major right-wing Super PAC has dropped $5 million into the Arizona Senate race, where Senator Mark Kelly is up against venture capital executive Blake Masters.

Mark Kelly is an environmental champion who just helped secure the most significant climate investment in history. Blake Masters is a climate change denier who's backed by white supremacists.

This move follows a poll that puts the race within two points. Masters' political backers see a window to swing this Senate race, and they've jumped on it. What's more: the same Super PAC has spent millions on the Senate race in Georgia for Herschel Walker to defeat Senator Raphael Warnock.

Peter: Bottom line, we need your help. Environmental field operations are still underfunded, and a group of donors has put together an emergency match fund to triple every contribution. We have to move now or we could lose these races.

Your support is needed to secure important wins from climate candidates in November. TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT when you make a gift of any amount ? even $5 makes a difference >>> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8d~

We have a goal to knock on 161,875 doors in Arizona, and a total of 1.17 million doors in critical swing states including Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. And we have digital ads running in support of dozens of pro-environmental candidates, which we'll continue leading up to the election.

Study after study shows that speaking with voters through field organizing is the best way to connect with voters about where candidates stand on critical issues ? and get them to turn out on Election Day.

We're scaling up on-the-ground canvassing operations, getting folks to sign commit-to-vote cards, and helping them sign up to vote by mail. And we're encouraging voters to commit to reminding three friends or family members to vote, a tactic called "Vote Tripling."

We're looking for fellow environmentalists like you, Peter, to help us continue our canvassing efforts and get pro-climate candidates elected in November. Can you chip in?

Every single vote counts. Please, pitch in ? ANY amount can really make a difference right now, even if it's just $5. This could be the difference between ensuring an environmental majority or setting us back indefinitely >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Help defeat Blake Masters and the other Big Oil candidates running this election cycle. Our future depends on it.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund
? Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www.lcvvictoryfund.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $7 or more right now between me and Voter Protection Project to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34311?t=6&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)** GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.** [**Please, will you split a donation of $7 or more now between me and Voter Protection Project so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34311?t=7&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34312?t=8&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34313?t=9&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34314?t=10&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34315?t=11&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34316?t=12&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
Thank you for all that you do.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=5374%2E878179%2EeEv6Sn)
